            company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    ) cd ON rm.movie_id = cd.movie_id AND cd.rn = 1
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            mk.movie_id,
            COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
        FROM 
            movie_keyword mk
        JOIN 
            keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        GROUP BY 
            mk.movie_id
    ) kc ON rm.movie_id = kc.movie_id
WHERE 
    rm.rank_by_cast <= 5
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, 
    rm.cast_count DESC;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        at.id AS title_id,
        at.title,
        at.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY at.production_year ORDER BY at.production_year DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        aka_title at
    WHERE 
        at.kind_id IN (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind LIKE 'movie%')
),
TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        rm.title_id,
        rm.title,
        rm.production_year,
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count
    FROM 
        RankedMovies rm
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON rm.title_id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON rm.title_id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE 
        rm.rn <= 10
    GROUP BY 
        rm.title_id, rm.title, rm.production_year, ak.name
),
ActorInfo AS (
    SELECT
        ak.person_id,
        ak.name,
        COALESCE(pi.info, 'No Info') AS actor_info
    FROM 
        aka_name ak
    LEFT JOIN 
        person_info pi ON ak.person_id = pi.person_id 
        AND pi.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info LIKE 'bio%')
)
SELECT 
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    tm.actor_name,
    ai.actor_info,
    tm.company_count
FROM 
    TopMovies tm
JOIN 
    ActorInfo ai ON tm.actor_name = ai.name
WHERE 
    tm.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    tm.production_year DESC, tm.title;
sql2:
SELECT 
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    tm.actor_name,
    COALESCE(pi.info, 'No Info') AS actor_info,
    tm.company_count
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            rm.title_id,
            rm.title,
            rm.production_year,
            ak.name AS actor_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count
        FROM 
            (
                SELECT 
                    at.id AS title_id,
                    at.title,
                    at.production_year,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY at.production_year ORDER BY at.production_year DESC) AS rn
                FROM 
                    aka_title at
                WHERE 
                    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM kind_type kt WHERE kt.id = at.kind_id AND kt.kind LIKE 'movie%')
            ) rm
        LEFT JOIN 
            complete_cast cc ON rm.title_id = cc.movie_id
        LEFT JOIN 
            cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
        LEFT JOIN 
            aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
        LEFT JOIN 
            movie_companies mc ON rm.title_id = mc.movie_id
        WHERE 
            rm.rn <= 10
        GROUP BY 
            rm.title_id, rm.title, rm.production_year, ak.name
    ) tm
JOIN 
    aka_name ai ON tm.actor_name = ai.name
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info pi ON ai.person_id = pi.person_id 
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM info_type it WHERE it.id = pi.info_type_id AND it.info LIKE 'bio%')
WHERE 
    tm.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    tm.production_year DESC, tm.title;

sql1:
WITH MovieStatistics AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS title_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS total_cast,
        AVG(CASE WHEN c.nr_order IS NOT NULL THEN c.nr_order ELSE 0 END) AS avg_order
    FROM 
        title t
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
),
KeywordStats AS (
    SELECT 
        mk.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT k.id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        movie_keyword mk
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    GROUP BY 
        mk.movie_id
),
RatingInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        mi.movie_id,
        MAX(mi.info) AS highest_rating
    FROM 
        movie_info mi
    JOIN 
        info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE 
        it.info = 'rating'
    GROUP BY 
        mi.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    ms.title_id,
    ms.title,
    ms.production_year,
    COALESCE(ks.keyword_count, 0) AS keyword_count,
    ms.total_cast,
    ms.avg_order,
    COALESCE(ri.highest_rating, 'N/A') AS highest_rating
FROM 
    MovieStatistics ms
LEFT JOIN 
    KeywordStats ks ON ms.title_id = ks.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    RatingInfo ri ON ms.title_id = ri.movie_id
WHERE 
    ms.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    ms.production_year DESC,
    ms.total_cast DESC,
    ms.avg_order ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    t.id AS title_id,
    t.title,
    t.production_year,
    COALESCE(
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT k.id)
         FROM movie_keyword mk
         JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
         WHERE mk.movie_id = t.id), 0
    ) AS keyword_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS total_cast,
    AVG(CASE WHEN c.nr_order IS NOT NULL THEN c.nr_order ELSE 0 END) AS avg_order,
    COALESCE(
        (SELECT MAX(mi.info)
         FROM movie_info mi
         WHERE mi.movie_id = t.id
           AND mi.info_type_id IN (SELECT it.id FROM info_type it WHERE it.info = 'rating')),
        'N/A'
    ) AS highest_rating
FROM 
    title t
LEFT JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY 
    t.id, t.title, t.production_year
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) DESC,
    AVG(CASE WHEN c.nr_order IS NOT NULL THEN c.nr_order ELSE 0 END) ASC;

sql1:
WITH MovieStats AS (
    SELECT 
        mt.id AS movie_id,
        mt.title,
        COALESCE(MIN(ci.nr_order), 0) AS min_cast_order,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mci.company_id) AS production_companies,
        AVG(CASE WHEN ti.info LIKE '%Oscar%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_oscar_award
    FROM aka_title mt
    LEFT JOIN complete_cast cc ON mt.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    LEFT JOIN movie_companies mci ON mt.id = mci.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN movie_info mi ON mt.id = mi.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN movie_info_idx ti ON mi.id = ti.movie_id
    GROUP BY mt.id, mt.title
),
TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.movie_id,
        ms.title,
        ms.min_cast_order,
        ms.production_companies,
        ms.has_oscar_award,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ms.production_companies DESC, ms.has_oscar_award DESC) AS rank
    FROM MovieStats ms
    WHERE ms.production_companies > 2
)
SELECT 
    tm.title,
    tm.min_cast_order,
    tm.production_companies,
    CASE 
        WHEN tm.has_oscar_award > 0 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS won_oscar
FROM TopMovies tm
WHERE tm.rank <= 10
ORDER BY tm.rank;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.title,
    sub.min_cast_order,
    sub.production_companies,
    CASE
        WHEN sub.has_oscar_award > 0 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS won_oscar
FROM (
    SELECT
        mt.id AS movie_id,
        mt.title,
        COALESCE(MIN(ci.nr_order), 0) AS min_cast_order,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mci.company_id) AS production_companies,
        AVG(CASE WHEN ti.info LIKE '%Oscar%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_oscar_award
    FROM aka_title mt
    LEFT JOIN complete_cast cc ON mt.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    LEFT JOIN movie_companies mci ON mt.id = mci.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN movie_info mi ON mt.id = mi.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN movie_info_idx ti ON mi.id = ti.movie_id
    GROUP BY mt.id, mt.title
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mci.company_id) > 2
) sub
ORDER BY sub.production_companies DESC, sub.has_oscar_award DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
WITH MovieTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        at.title, 
        at.production_year, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
    FROM 
        aka_title at
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info c ON at.movie_id = c.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        at.title, at.production_year
),
TopGenres AS (
    SELECT 
        kt.kind AS genre, 
        COUNT(mt.title) AS movie_count
    FROM 
        kind_type kt
    JOIN 
        aka_title at ON kt.id = at.kind_id
    JOIN 
        MovieTitles mt ON at.title = mt.title
    GROUP BY 
        kt.kind
    ORDER BY 
        movie_count DESC
    LIMIT 5
),
ActorInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        an.name AS actor_name, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) AS movies_played,
        AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - mt.production_year) AS avg_movie_age
    FROM 
        aka_name an
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON an.person_id = c.person_id
    JOIN 
        aka_title mt ON c.movie_id = mt.movie_id
    WHERE 
        mt.production_year IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        an.name
    HAVING 
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) > 5
)
SELECT 
    ti.genre, 
    ai.actor_name, 
    ai.movies_played,
    ai.avg_movie_age
FROM 
    TopGenres ti
CROSS JOIN 
    ActorInfo ai
WHERE 
    ai.avg_movie_age IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    ti.movie_count DESC, ai.movies_played DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    ti.genre,
    ai.actor_name,
    ai.movies_played,
    ai.avg_movie_age
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            kt.kind AS genre,
            COUNT(sub_mt.title) AS movie_count
        FROM
            kind_type kt
        JOIN
            aka_title at ON kt.id = at.kind_id
        JOIN
            (
                SELECT
                    at2.title,
                    at2.production_year,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT c2.person_id) AS cast_count
                FROM
                    aka_title at2
                LEFT JOIN
                    cast_info c2 ON at2.movie_id = c2.movie_id
                GROUP BY
                    at2.title, at2.production_year
            ) sub_mt ON at.title = sub_mt.title
        GROUP BY
            kt.kind
        ORDER BY
            movie_count DESC
        LIMIT 5
    ) ti
CROSS JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            actor_name,
            movies_played,
            avg_movie_age
        FROM
            (
                SELECT
                    an.name AS actor_name,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) AS movies_played,
                    AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - mt.production_year) AS avg_movie_age
                FROM
                    aka_name an
                JOIN
                    cast_info c ON an.person_id = c.person_id
                JOIN
                    aka_title mt ON c.movie_id = mt.movie_id
                WHERE
                    mt.production_year IS NOT NULL
                GROUP BY
                    an.name
            ) actor_agg
        WHERE
            movies_played > 5
            AND avg_movie_age IS NOT NULL
    ) ai
ORDER BY
    ti.movie_count DESC, ai.movies_played DESC;

sql1:
WITH MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        at.id AS title_id,
        at.title,
        at.production_year,
        COALESCE(SUM(mk.id), 0) AS keyword_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cc.subject_id) AS actor_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY at.id ORDER BY at.production_year DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        aka_title at
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON at.movie_id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON at.movie_id = cc.movie_id
    WHERE 
        at.production_year IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        at.id, at.title, at.production_year
),
FilteredMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        md.title_id,
        md.title,
        md.production_year,
        md.keyword_count,
        md.actor_count,
        CASE 
            WHEN md.actor_count > 10 THEN 'Blockbuster'
            WHEN md.actor_count BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN 'Popular'
            ELSE 'Indie'
        END AS classification
    FROM 
        MovieDetails md
    WHERE 
        md.rn = 1
        AND md.production_year > 2000
)
SELECT 
    f.title_id,
    f.title,
    f.production_year,
    f.keyword_count,
    f.actor_count,
    f.classification,
    COALESCE(cn.name, 'Unknown') AS company_name
FROM 
    FilteredMovies f
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON f.title_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
WHERE 
    (f.actor_count > 0 OR f.keyword_count > 0)
ORDER BY 
    f.production_year DESC, 
    f.title;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.title_id,
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.keyword_count,
    sub.actor_count,
    CASE
        WHEN sub.actor_count > 10 THEN 'Blockbuster'
        WHEN sub.actor_count BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN 'Popular'
        ELSE 'Indie'
    END AS classification,
    COALESCE(cn.name, 'Unknown') AS company_name
FROM (
    SELECT
        at.id AS title_id,
        at.title,
        at.production_year,
        COALESCE(SUM(mk.id), 0) AS keyword_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cc.subject_id) AS actor_count
    FROM
        aka_title at
    LEFT JOIN
        movie_keyword mk ON at.movie_id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN
        complete_cast cc ON at.movie_id = cc.movie_id
    WHERE
        at.production_year IS NOT NULL
        AND at.production_year > 2000
    GROUP BY
        at.id, at.title, at.production_year
    HAVING
        COUNT(DISTINCT cc.subject_id) > 0 OR COALESCE(SUM(mk.id), 0) > 0
) sub
LEFT JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON sub.title_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC,
    sub.title;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS year_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
ActorRoles AS (
    SELECT 
        c.movie_id,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        r.role AS role_name,
        c.nr_order
    FROM 
        cast_info c
    JOIN 
        aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
    JOIN 
        role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
),
CompanyDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        cn.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM 
        movie_companies mc
    JOIN 
        company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN 
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT 
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    ar.actor_name,
    ar.role_name,
    cd.company_name,
    cd.company_type
FROM 
    RankedMovies rm
LEFT JOIN 
    ActorRoles ar ON rm.movie_id = ar.movie_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    CompanyDetails cd ON rm.movie_id = cd.movie_id
WHERE 
    rm.year_rank <= 3
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, ar.nr_order
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
SELECT
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS role_name,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS year_rank,
        t.id AS join_id
    FROM
        aka_title t
    WHERE
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
) rm
LEFT JOIN cast_info c ON rm.join_id = c.movie_id
LEFT JOIN aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
LEFT JOIN role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN movie_companies mc ON rm.join_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
LEFT JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
WHERE
    rm.year_rank <= 3
ORDER BY
    rm.production_year DESC, c.nr_order
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT
        mt.id AS movie_id,
        mt.title,
        mt.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mt.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM
        aka_title mt
    LEFT JOIN
        movie_companies mc ON mt.id = mc.movie_id
    GROUP BY
        mt.id, mt.title, mt.production_year
),
TopMovies AS (
    SELECT
        movie_id,
        title,
        production_year,
        company_count
    FROM
        RankedMovies
    WHERE
        rank <= 5
),
ActorDetails AS (
    SELECT
        ka.name AS actor_name,
        mt.title,
        mt.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS actor_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ci.note IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_notes
    FROM
        aka_name ka
    INNER JOIN
        cast_info ci ON ka.person_id = ci.person_id
    INNER JOIN
        aka_title mt ON ci.movie_id = mt.id
    GROUP BY
        ka.name, mt.title, mt.production_year
)
SELECT
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    tm.company_count,
    ad.actor_name,
    ad.actor_count,
    ad.has_notes
FROM
    TopMovies tm
LEFT JOIN
    ActorDetails ad ON tm.title = ad.title AND tm.production_year = ad.production_year
WHERE
    (tm.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020)
    AND (ad.actor_count IS NULL OR ad.actor_count > 2)
ORDER BY
    tm.production_year DESC, 
    tm.company_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    tm.company_count,
    ad.actor_name,
    ad.actor_count,
    ad.has_notes
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            movie_id,
            title,
            production_year,
            company_count
        FROM
            (
                SELECT
                    mt.id AS movie_id,
                    mt.title,
                    mt.production_year,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mt.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) DESC) AS rank
                FROM
                    aka_title mt
                LEFT JOIN
                    movie_companies mc ON mt.id = mc.movie_id
                GROUP BY
                    mt.id, mt.title, mt.production_year
            ) RankedMovies
        WHERE
            rank <= 5
    ) tm
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            mt.title,
            mt.production_year,
            ka.name AS actor_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS actor_count,
            SUM(CASE WHEN ci.note IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_notes
        FROM
            cast_info ci
        INNER JOIN
            aka_name ka ON ka.person_id = ci.person_id
        INNER JOIN
            aka_title mt ON ci.movie_id = mt.id
        GROUP BY
            ka.name, mt.title, mt.production_year
        HAVING
            COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) > 2
    ) ad ON tm.title = ad.title AND tm.production_year = ad.production_year
WHERE
    tm.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
ORDER BY
    tm.production_year DESC,
    tm.company_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    m.title AS movie_title, 
    m.production_year, 
    c.role_id, 
    p.info AS actor_info, 
    COALESCE(cmp.name, 'N/A') AS company_name, 
    k.keyword AS keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON m.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cmp ON mc.company_id = cmp.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    m.production_year > 2000 AND 
    c.nr_order < 5 AND 
    k.keyword LIKE '%action%' 
ORDER BY 
    m.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
filtered_cast AS (
    SELECT person_id, movie_id, role_id
    FROM cast_info
    WHERE nr_order < 5
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    ft.title AS movie_title, 
    ft.production_year, 
    fc.role_id, 
    p.info AS actor_info, 
    COALESCE(cmp.name, 'N/A') AS company_name, 
    ak.keyword AS keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
INNER JOIN 
    filtered_cast fc ON a.person_id = fc.person_id
INNER JOIN 
    filtered_titles ft ON fc.movie_id = ft.movie_id
INNER JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
INNER JOIN 
    company_name cmp ON mc.company_id = cmp.id
INNER JOIN 
    action_keywords ak ON ft.id = ak.movie_id
INNER JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY 
    ft.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        title.id AS title_id,
        title.title AS title_name,
        title.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY title.production_year ORDER BY title.id) AS year_rank
    FROM title
    WHERE title.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
PopularKeywords AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id,
        COUNT(keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM movie_keyword
    GROUP BY movie_id
    HAVING COUNT(keyword_id) > 2
),
CompanyDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        cn.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT 
    rt.title_name,
    rt.production_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS cast_count,
    cd.company_name,
    cd.company_type,
    pk.keyword_count
FROM RankedTitles rt
LEFT JOIN complete_cast cc ON rt.title_id = cc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN cast_info ca ON cc.id = ca.movie_id
LEFT JOIN CompanyDetails cd ON rt.title_id = cd.movie_id
LEFT JOIN PopularKeywords pk ON rt.title_id = pk.movie_id
WHERE rt.year_rank <= 5
GROUP BY rt.title_name, rt.production_year, cd.company_name, cd.company_type, pk.keyword_count
ORDER BY rt.production_year DESC, cast_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    rt.title_name,
    rt.production_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS cast_count,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    pk.keyword_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        title.id AS title_id,
        title.title AS title_name,
        title.production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE title.production_year IS NOT NULL
      AND ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY title.production_year ORDER BY title.id) <= 5
) rt
LEFT JOIN complete_cast cc ON rt.title_id = cc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN cast_info ca ON cc.id = ca.movie_id
LEFT JOIN movie_companies mc ON rt.title_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
LEFT JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        movie_id,
        COUNT(keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM movie_keyword
    GROUP BY movie_id
    HAVING COUNT(keyword_id) > 2
) pk ON rt.title_id = pk.movie_id
GROUP BY rt.title_name, rt.production_year, cn.name, ct.kind, pk.keyword_count
ORDER BY rt.production_year DESC, cast_count DESC;

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS title_id, 
        t.title, 
        t.production_year, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.title) AS title_rank
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        mt.movie_id, 
        mt.company_id, 
        cn.name AS company_name, 
        ct.kind AS company_type, 
        mi.info AS movie_info
    FROM movie_companies mt
    JOIN company_name cn ON mt.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type ct ON mt.company_type_id = ct.id
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mt.movie_id = mi.movie_id 
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Synopsis')
),
ActorDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        ci.movie_id, 
        ak.name AS actor_name, 
        ak.person_id, 
        rt.role AS role_name
    FROM cast_info ci 
    JOIN aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
    JOIN role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
),
FinalReport AS (
    SELECT 
        rt.title, 
        rt.production_year, 
        md.company_name, 
        md.company_type, 
        ad.actor_name, 
        ad.role_name
    FROM RankedTitles rt
    LEFT JOIN MovieDetails md ON rt.title_id = md.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN ActorDetails ad ON md.movie_id = ad.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    title, 
    production_year, 
    company_name, 
    company_type, 
    actor_name, 
    role_name 
FROM FinalReport
WHERE production_year > 2000 
ORDER BY production_year DESC, title;
sql2:
SELECT 
    t.title, 
    t.production_year, 
    cn.name AS company_name, 
    ct.kind AS company_type, 
    ak.name AS actor_name, 
    rt.role AS role_name
FROM title t
LEFT JOIN (
    movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mc.movie_id = mi.movie_id
    JOIN info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'Synopsis'
) ON t.id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN (
    cast_info ci
    JOIN aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
    JOIN role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
) ON mc.movie_id = ci.movie_id
WHERE t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, t.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ci.nr_order AS cast_order,
    c.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ti.info AS additional_info,
    rr.role AS role_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
JOIN 
    role_type rr ON ci.role_id = rr.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
    AND c.country_code = 'USA'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    ci.nr_order ASC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.name AS company_name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    WHERE c.country_code = 'USA'
),
recent_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
cast_with_role AS (
    SELECT ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, ci.nr_order, ci.role_id, rr.role
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN role_type rr ON ci.role_id = rr.id
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_additional AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ti.info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rt.title AS movie_title,
    cwr.nr_order AS cast_order,
    uc.company_name AS company_name,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ma.info AS additional_info,
    cwr.role AS role_type
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN cast_with_role cwr ON a.person_id = cwr.person_id
JOIN recent_titles rt ON cwr.movie_id = rt.id
JOIN usa_companies uc ON rt.id = uc.movie_id
JOIN movie_kw mkw ON rt.id = mkw.movie_id
JOIN movie_additional ma ON rt.id = ma.movie_id
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC,
    cwr.nr_order ASC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    co.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    mt.kind AS company_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    company_type mt ON mc.company_type_id = mt.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND mt.kind = 'Distributor'
    AND a.name ILIKE '%Smith%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_actors AS (
    SELECT person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name ILIKE '%Smith%'
),
distributor AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM company_type
    WHERE kind = 'Distributor'
),
recent_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
actor_cast AS (
    SELECT fa.name AS actor_name, c.movie_id, c.nr_order
    FROM filtered_actors fa
    JOIN cast_info c ON fa.person_id = c.person_id
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT rt.id AS movie_id, rt.title, rt.production_year,
           co.name AS company_name, d.id AS company_type_id
    FROM recent_titles rt
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON rt.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    JOIN distributor d ON mc.company_type_id = d.id
)
SELECT
    ac.actor_name AS actor_name,
    tc.title AS movie_title,
    ac.nr_order AS cast_order,
    tc.company_name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    'Distributor' AS company_type
FROM
    actor_cast ac
JOIN
    title_companies tc ON ac.movie_id = tc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON tc.movie_id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
ORDER BY
    tc.production_year DESC,
    ac.actor_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    r.role AS role_name, 
    c.name AS company_name, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword 
FROM 
    title t 
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id

    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id

sql2:
WITH usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.name AS company_name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    WHERE c.country_code = 'USA'
),
movie_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
actor_roles AS (
    SELECT ci.id AS ci_id, ci.person_id, ci.role_id, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
    WHERE a.name IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ar.actor_name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS role_name,
    uc.company_name AS company_name,
    mk.movie_keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    title t
JOIN
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN
    actor_roles ar ON cc.subject_id = ar.ci_id
JOIN
    role_type r ON ar.role_id = r.id
JOIN
    usa_companies uc ON t.id = uc.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_keywords mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
WHERE
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC,
    ar.actor_name ASC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    co.name AS company_name,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS actor_info,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    rc.role AS role_type
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type rc ON ci.role_id = rc.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020 
    AND a.name LIKE '%Smith%' 
    AND mk.keyword_id IN (SELECT id FROM keyword WHERE keyword LIKE '%action%')
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
filtered_actors AS (
    SELECT person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name LIKE '%Smith%'
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
)
SELECT 
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    co.name AS company_name,
    fa.name AS actor_name,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS actor_info,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    rc.role AS role_type
FROM 
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    filtered_actors fa ON ci.person_id = fa.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    action_keywords ak ON ft.id = ak.movie_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON fa.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type rc ON ci.role_id = rc.id
ORDER BY 
    ft.title, fa.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.person_id,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT rr.role_id) AS total_roles,
    AVG(mi.info_length) AS avg_info_length
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         movie_id,
         AVG(LENGTH(info)) AS info_length
     FROM 
         movie_info 
     GROUP BY 
         movie_id) mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         ci2.role_id, 
         ci2.movie_id 
     FROM 
         cast_info ci2 
     GROUP BY 
         ci2.role_id, ci2.movie_id) rr ON ci.role_id = rr.role_id AND ci.movie_id = rr.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY 
    a.person_id, a.name, t.title, ct.kind, mi.info_length
ORDER BY 
    total_roles DESC, avg_info_length DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH mi AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id,
        AVG(LENGTH(info)) AS info_length
    FROM 
        movie_info 
    GROUP BY 
        movie_id
)
SELECT 
    a.person_id,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ci.role_id) AS total_roles,
    AVG(mi.info_length) AS avg_info_length
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN 
    mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY 
    a.person_id, a.name, t.title, ct.kind, mi.info_length
ORDER BY 
    total_roles DESC, avg_info_length DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
WITH RankedTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS title_id, 
        t.title, 
        t.production_year, 
        r.role, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year, r.role ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        role_type r ON t.kind_id = r.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
),
MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id, 
        c.name AS company_name, 
        k.keyword AS keyword 
    FROM 
        movie_companies mc
    JOIN 
        company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON mc.movie_id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT 
    rt.title_id, 
    rt.title, 
    rt.production_year, 
    md.company_name, 
    md.keyword
FROM 
    RankedTitles rt
JOIN 
    MovieDetails md ON rt.title_id = md.movie_id
WHERE 
    rt.rank = 1
GROUP BY 
    rt.title_id, 
    rt.title, 
    rt.production_year, 
    md.company_name, 
    md.keyword
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, 
    rt.title ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    rt.title_id, 
    rt.title, 
    rt.production_year, 
    c.name AS company_name, 
    k.keyword
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            t.id AS title_id, 
            t.title, 
            t.production_year, 
            r.role, 
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year, r.role ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rank
        FROM 
            title t
        JOIN 
            role_type r ON t.kind_id = r.id
        WHERE 
            t.production_year IS NOT NULL
    ) rt
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON rt.title_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON mc.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    rt.rank = 1
GROUP BY 
    rt.title_id, 
    rt.title, 
    rt.production_year, 
    c.name, 
    k.keyword
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, 
    rt.title ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    ak.name AS aka_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.role_id AS cast_role, 
    cn.name AS company_name, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    pi.info AS person_info, 
    ct.kind AS company_type
FROM 
    aka_name ak
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info pi ON ak.person_id = pi.person_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND k.keyword ILIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, ak.name, t.title;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword ILIKE '%action%'
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cn.name AS company_name, ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT 
    ak.name AS aka_name, 
    ft.title AS movie_title, 
    c.role_id AS cast_role, 
    ci.company_name, 
    ak_kw.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    pi.info AS person_info, 
    ci.company_type
FROM 
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ft.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name ak ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    person_info pi ON ak.person_id = pi.person_id
JOIN 
    action_keywords ak_kw ON ft.id = ak_kw.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    ft.production_year DESC, ak.name, ft.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.kind AS company_type, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    p.info AS actor_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN

    AND c.kind LIKE '%Production%'

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
prod_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE ct.kind LIKE '%Production%'
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    pc.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS actor_info

JOIN

LEFT JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN

    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY
    a.name,
    ft.title;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) DESC) AS year_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
),
PopularActors AS (
    SELECT 
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT rc.movie_id) AS movie_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT rc.movie_id) DESC) AS actor_rank
    FROM 
        aka_name ak
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON ak.person_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN 
        RankedMovies rc ON ci.movie_id = rc.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        ak.name
)
SELECT 
    pm.actor_name,
    pm.movie_count,
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    rm.cast_count
FROM 
    PopularActors pm
JOIN 
    RankedMovies rm ON pm.movie_count >= 5 AND rm.year_rank <= 3
ORDER BY 
    pm.movie_count DESC, rm.production_year DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    pm.actor_name,
    pm.movie_count,
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    rm.cast_count
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            ak.name AS actor_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT rc.movie_id) AS movie_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT rc.movie_id) DESC) AS actor_rank
        FROM 
            aka_name ak
        JOIN 
            cast_info ci ON ak.person_id = ci.person_id
        JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    t.id AS movie_id,
                    t.title,
                    t.production_year,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) DESC) AS year_rank
                FROM 
                    aka_title t
                JOIN 
                    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
                JOIN 
                    cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
                GROUP BY 
                    t.id, t.title, t.production_year
            ) rc ON ci.movie_id = rc.movie_id
        GROUP BY 
            ak.name
    ) pm
CROSS JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            t.id AS movie_id,
            t.title,
            t.production_year,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) DESC) AS year_rank
        FROM 
            aka_title t
        JOIN 
            complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
        JOIN 
            cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
        GROUP BY 
            t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    ) rm
WHERE 
    pm.movie_count >= 5 
    AND rm.year_rank <= 3
ORDER BY 
    pm.movie_count DESC, rm.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT a.name AS actor_name, t.title AS movie_title, c.kind AS company_type, k.keyword AS movie_keyword, p.info AS person_info
FROM aka_name a
JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
AND c.kind IN ('Distributor', 'Production Company')
AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, actor_name, movie_title;
sql2:
WITH bio_type AS (
    SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography'
),
valid_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind = 'Distributor' OR c.kind = 'Production Company'
),
movie_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT a.name AS actor_name, t.title AS movie_title, vc.company_type AS company_type, mk.movie_keyword AS movie_keyword, p.info AS person_info
FROM aka_name a
JOIN person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN bio_type bt ON p.info_type_id = bt.id
JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id AND t.production_year >= 2000
JOIN valid_companies vc ON t.id = vc.movie_id
JOIN movie_keywords mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, actor_name, movie_title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    ct.kind AS company_type, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    pi.info AS actor_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id
WHERE 
    ct.kind LIKE '%Production%'
    AND t.production_year > 2000
    AND pi.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info LIKE '%biography%')
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, ct.kind, k.keyword, pi.info
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.title;
sql2:
WITH bio_persons AS (
    SELECT pi.person_id, pi.info
    FROM person_info pi
    JOIN info_type it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE it.info LIKE '%biography%'
),
movie_data AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, mc.company_type_id, mk.keyword_id
    FROM title t
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    md.title AS movie_title,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    bp.info AS actor_info
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    bio_persons bp ON a.person_id = bp.person_id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    movie_data md ON ci.movie_id = md.movie_id
JOIN
    company_type ct ON md.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN
    keyword k ON md.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE
    ct.kind LIKE '%Production%'
GROUP BY
    a.name, md.title, ct.kind, k.keyword, bp.info
ORDER BY
    a.name, md.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.kind AS cast_type, 
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword 
FROM 
    aka_name a 
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id 
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id 
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id 
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000 
    AND c.kind LIKE 'Actor%'
    AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography') 
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH bio_type AS (
    SELECT id AS info_type_id
    FROM info_type
    WHERE info = 'Biography'
),
movie_keys AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    mk.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    title t
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    bio_type bt ON p.info_type_id = bt.info_type_id
JOIN
    movie_keys mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
WHERE
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND c.kind LIKE 'Actor%'
ORDER BY
    a.name, t.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS comp_cast_type,
    c2.name AS company_name,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    cast_info ci
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON ci.movie_id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON cc.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c2 ON mc.company_id = c2.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON cc.movie_id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON cc.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020 
    AND c.kind = 'cast' 
    AND m.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Box Office')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS comp_cast_type,
    c2.name AS company_name,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    complete_cast cc
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id AND c.kind = 'cast'
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON cc.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c2 ON mc.company_id = c2.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON cc.movie_id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON m.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'Box Office'
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON cc.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
WITH MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title, 
        t.production_year, 
        c.name AS company_name, 
        rt.role AS role_name, 
        a.name AS actor_name, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    JOIN 
        aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    JOIN 
        role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year >= 2000
    GROUP BY 
        t.title, t.production_year, c.name, rt.role, a.name
),
Ranking AS (
    SELECT 
        title, 
        production_year, 
        company_name, 
        role_name, 
        actor_name, 
        keyword_count,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY production_year ORDER BY keyword_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        MovieDetails
)
SELECT 
    title, 
    production_year, 
    company_name, 
    role_name, 
    actor_name, 
    keyword_count
FROM 
    Ranking
WHERE 
    rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    production_year, rank;
sql2:
SELECT
    md.title,
    md.production_year,
    md.company_name,
    md.role_name,
    md.actor_name,
    md.keyword_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        c.name AS company_name,
        rt.role AS role_name,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM
        title t
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
    LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    JOIN role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
    GROUP BY t.title, t.production_year, c.name, rt.role, a.name
) md
WHERE (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.title,
            t2.production_year,
            c2.name AS company_name,
            rt2.role AS role_name,
            a2.name AS actor_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT k2.keyword) AS keyword_count
        FROM
            title t2
        JOIN movie_companies mc2 ON t2.id = mc2.movie_id
        JOIN company_name c2 ON mc2.company_id = c2.id
        JOIN complete_cast cc2 ON t2.id = cc2.movie_id
        JOIN cast_info ci2 ON cc2.subject_id = ci2.id
        JOIN aka_name a2 ON ci2.person_id = a2.person_id
        LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk2 ON t2.id = mk2.movie_id
        LEFT JOIN keyword k2 ON mk2.keyword_id = k2.id
        JOIN role_type rt2 ON ci2.role_id = rt2.id
        WHERE t2.production_year >= 2000
          AND t2.production_year = md.production_year
        GROUP BY t2.title, t2.production_year, c2.name, rt2.role, a2.name
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT k2.keyword) > md.keyword_count
    ) better
) < 5
ORDER BY
    md.production_year,
    md.keyword_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.info) AS personal_info_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
    AND ct.kind = 'Distributor'
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, ct.kind
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, personal_info_count DESC;
sql2:
WITH eligible_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM movie_companies mc
          JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
          JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
          WHERE mc.movie_id = t.id
            AND ct.kind = 'Distributor'
      )
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    em.title AS movie_title,
    'Distributor' AS company_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.info) AS personal_info_count
FROM
    eligible_movies em
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON em.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON em.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
GROUP BY
    a.name, em.title
ORDER BY
    keyword_count DESC, personal_info_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    c.kind AS company_type
FROM 
    aka_name a 
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id 
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id 
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id 
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id 
WHERE 
    a.name LIKE 'J%' 
    AND t.production_year > 2000 
    AND c.kind IN ('Distributor', 'Producer')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_names AS (
    SELECT person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name LIKE 'J%'
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
filtered_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM company_type c
        WHERE c.id = mc.company_type_id
          AND c.kind IN ('Distributor', 'Producer')
    )
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    INNER JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    fn.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    tk.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    fc.kind AS company_type
FROM
    filtered_names fn
INNER JOIN cast_info ci ON fn.person_id = ci.person_id
INNER JOIN filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.movie_id
INNER JOIN movie_info m ON ft.id = m.movie_id
INNER JOIN title_keywords tk ON ft.id = tk.movie_id
INNER JOIN filtered_companies fc ON ft.id = fc.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC, fn.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.kind AS company_type, 
    m.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    a.name IS NOT NULL AND 
    t.production_year >= 2000 AND 
    m.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Box Office') 
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH box_office_info AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE it.info = 'Box Office'
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.kind AS company_type, 
    boi.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    cast_info ci
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    box_office_info boi ON t.id = boi.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    a.name IS NOT NULL AND 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.nr_order AS role_order, 
    ct.kind AS company_type, 
    gm.info AS genre_info
FROM 
    aka_name a 
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id 
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id 
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id 
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info gm ON t.id = gm.movie_id AND gm.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Genre') 
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND ct.kind = 'Distributor' 
ORDER BY 
    a.name, 
    t.title;
sql2:
WITH genre_type AS (
    SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Genre'
),
distributor AS (
    SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'Distributor'
),
base_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id AS aka_title_id, t.movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM aka_title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    bm.title AS movie_title, 
    c.nr_order AS role_order, 
    'Distributor' AS company_type, 
    gm.info AS genre_info
FROM 
    base_movies bm
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON bm.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON bm.aka_title_id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON bm.aka_title_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    distributor d ON mc.company_type_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info gm ON bm.aka_title_id = gm.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    genre_type gt ON gm.info_type_id = gt.id
WHERE 
    (gm.id IS NULL OR gt.id IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY 
    a.name, 
    bm.title;

sql1:
SELECT t.title, a.name AS actor_name, c.kind AS company_type, mi.info AS movie_info
FROM title t
JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN aka_name a ON cc.subject_id = a.person_id
JOIN movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
  AND c.kind ILIKE '%Production%'
  AND a.name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, t.title ASC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
prod_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    INNER JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    INNER JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind ILIKE '%Production%'
),
valid_actors AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, a.name
    FROM complete_cast cc
    INNER JOIN aka_name a ON cc.subject_id = a.person_id
    WHERE a.name IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT ft.title,
       va.name AS actor_name,
       pc.kind AS company_type,
       mi.info AS movie_info
FROM filtered_titles ft
INNER JOIN prod_companies pc ON ft.id = pc.movie_id
INNER JOIN valid_actors va ON ft.id = va.movie_id
INNER JOIN movie_info mi ON ft.id = mi.movie_id
ORDER BY ft.production_year DESC, ft.title ASC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    aka_name ASC;
sql2:
WITH bio_info AS (
    SELECT p.person_id, p.info
    FROM person_info p
    JOIN info_type it ON p.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE it.info = 'Biography'
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    mc2.kind AS company_type,
    bi.info AS person_info,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    bio_info bi ON a.person_id = bi.person_id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id AND t.production_year >= 2000
JOIN
    movie_comp mc2 ON t.id = mc2.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_kw mkw ON t.id = mkw.movie_id
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC,
    aka_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
AND 
    k.keyword LIKE 'Action%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE 'Action%'
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    ft.production_year,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    mc2.kind AS company_type,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN
    filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN
    action_keywords ak ON ft.id = ak.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_comp mc2 ON ft.id = mc2.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id, 
        t.title, 
        t.production_year, 
        k.keyword,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS year_rank
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year >= 2000
),
TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id, 
        title, 
        production_year, 
        keyword
    FROM 
        RankedMovies
    WHERE 
        year_rank <= 10
),
CastDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        cm.movie_id, 
        p.id AS person_id, 
        p.name AS actor_name, 
        r.role AS role_name
    FROM 
        complete_cast cm
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cm.movie_id = ci.movie_id
    JOIN 
        aka_name p ON ci.person_id = p.person_id
    JOIN 
        role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
)
SELECT 
    tm.title, 
    tm.production_year, 
    tm.keyword, 
    cd.actor_name, 
    cd.role_name
FROM 
    TopMovies tm
JOIN 
    CastDetails cd ON tm.movie_id = cd.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    tm.production_year DESC, 
    tm.title;
sql2:
SELECT 
    sub.title, 
    sub.production_year, 
    sub.keyword, 
    p.name AS actor_name, 
    r.role AS role_name
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            t.id AS movie_id, 
            t.title, 
            t.production_year, 
            k.keyword
        FROM 
            title t
        JOIN 
            movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
        JOIN 
            keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        WHERE 
            t.production_year >= 2000
            AND ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) <= 10
    ) sub
JOIN 
    complete_cast cm ON sub.movie_id = cm.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cm.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name p ON ci.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
ORDER BY 
    sub.production_year DESC, 
    sub.title;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS company_count
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
),
TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id, 
        title,
        production_year,
        company_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY company_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        RankedMovies
)
SELECT 
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    ak.name AS actor_name,
    kt.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    TopMovies tm
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON tm.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON tm.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword kt ON mk.keyword_id = kt.id
WHERE 
    tm.rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    tm.production_year DESC, 
    tm.company_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    ak.name AS actor_name,
    kt.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS company_count
    FROM
        title t
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
    WHERE
        t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    GROUP BY
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    HAVING
        COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) >= (
            SELECT MIN(cc) FROM (
                SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m2.id) AS cc
                FROM title t2
                JOIN movie_companies mc2 ON t2.id = mc2.movie_id
                JOIN company_name m2 ON mc2.company_id = m2.id
                WHERE t2.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
                GROUP BY t2.id
                ORDER BY cc DESC
                LIMIT 10
            ) top10
        )
) sub
JOIN cast_info ci ON sub.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON sub.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN keyword kt ON mk.keyword_id = kt.id
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC,
    sub.company_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    i.info AS additional_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM

JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
AND 
    c.kind = 'Distributor'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC,
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
distributor_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cn.id AS cn_id
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    WHERE mc.company_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'Distributor')
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,

    cast_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id

JOIN
    movie_info mi ON ft.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN
    info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a

JOIN

JOIN

LEFT JOIN

LEFT JOIN

LEFT JOIN

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
filtered_cast_types AS (
    SELECT id, kind
    FROM comp_cast_type
    WHERE kind IN ('actor', 'actress')
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        a.person_id,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        ft.title AS movie_title,
        ft.production_year,
        fct.kind AS cast_type,
        ci.movie_id
    FROM aka_name a
    JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
    JOIN filtered_cast_types fct ON ci.person_role_id = fct.id
)
SELECT
    b.actor_name,
    b.movie_title,
    b.cast_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN person_info p ON b.person_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON b.movie_id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
ORDER BY
    b.production_year DESC,
    b.actor_name ASC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.note AS role_note,
    comp.name AS company_name,
    it.info AS additional_info,
    COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name comp ON mc.company_id = comp.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND c.nr_order < 5
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, c.note, comp.name, it.info
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, t.title ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_cast AS (
    SELECT a.name AS actor_name, c.note AS role_note, c.movie_id
    FROM aka_name a
    JOIN cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
    WHERE c.nr_order < 5
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.movie_id, t.title AS movie_title
    FROM aka_title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
)
SELECT 
    fc.actor_name,
    ft.movie_title,
    fc.role_note,
    comp.name AS company_name,
    it.info AS additional_info,
    COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    filtered_cast fc
JOIN 
    filtered_titles ft ON fc.movie_id = ft.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name comp ON mc.company_id = comp.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON ft.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
GROUP BY 
    fc.actor_name, ft.movie_title, fc.role_note, comp.name, it.info
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, ft.movie_title ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info,
    r.role AS role_description
FROM 
    cast_info ci 
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id 
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id 
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id 
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.id = p.person_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND c.kind LIKE '%Film%' 
ORDER BY

    actor_name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
film_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind LIKE '%Film%'
),
movie_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    ft.production_year,
    fc.kind AS company_type,
    mks.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info,
    r.role AS role_description
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    film_companies fc ON ft.id = fc.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_keywords mks ON ft.id = mks.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    person_info p ON a.id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    actor_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.id AS title_id,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.person_role_id,
    r.role AS role_name,
    m.info AS company_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND m.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Budget') 
    AND k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id AS title_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
budget_info AS (
    SELECT m.movie_id, m.info
    FROM movie_info m
    JOIN info_type it ON m.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'Budget'
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
)
SELECT 
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    fm.title_id AS title_id,
    fm.title AS movie_title,
    c.person_role_id,
    r.role AS role_name,
    bi.info AS company_info,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    filtered_movies fm ON c.movie_id = fm.title_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    budget_info bi ON fm.title_id = bi.movie_id
JOIN 
    action_keywords ak ON fm.title_id = ak.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY 
    fm.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    a.imdb_index AS actor_imdb_index,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    ct.kind AS cast_type,
    COUNT(*) AS total_movies
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
WHERE 
    a.name IS NOT NULL 
    AND t.production_year > 2000
    AND c.kind LIKE 'Full Cast%'
GROUP BY 
    a.name, a.imdb_index, t.title, t.production_year, c.kind, ct.kind
ORDER BY 
    total_movies DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_cast AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN comp_cast_type c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind LIKE 'Full Cast%'
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_cast fc WHERE fc.movie_id = t.id)
),
movie_company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind AS company_type_kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM company_name cn WHERE cn.id = mc.company_id)
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    a.imdb_index AS actor_imdb_index,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    ft.production_year,
    (SELECT c.kind FROM comp_cast_type c JOIN complete_cast cc ON cc.subject_id = c.id WHERE cc.movie_id = ft.id AND c.kind LIKE 'Full Cast%' LIMIT 1) AS kind,
    mci.company_type_kind AS cast_type,
    COUNT(*) AS total_movies
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN
    movie_company_info mci ON ft.id = mci.movie_id
WHERE
    a.name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    a.name, a.imdb_index, ft.title, ft.production_year, kind, mci.company_type_kind
ORDER BY
    total_movies DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND k.keyword IN ('Action', 'Drama')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM movie_keyword mk
          JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
          WHERE mk.movie_id = t.id
            AND (k.keyword = 'Action' OR k.keyword = 'Drama')
      )
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    fm.title AS movie_title,
    fm.production_year,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    filtered_movies fm ON ci.movie_id = fm.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON fm.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
      AND (k.keyword = 'Action' OR k.keyword = 'Drama')
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY 
    fm.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql2:

),
prod_companies AS (
