sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    c.kind AS company_type, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    i.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
AND 
    c.kind = 'Production'
AND 
    k.keyword LIKE '%Action%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%Action%'
),
production_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind = 'Production'
)
SELECT
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    pc.company_type,
    ak.movie_keyword,
    i.info AS movie_info
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
    JOIN production_companies pc ON ft.id = pc.movie_id
    JOIN action_keywords ak ON ft.id = ak.movie_id
    JOIN movie_info mi ON ft.id = mi.movie_id
    JOIN info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    a.name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.name AS company_name,
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    a.name LIKE 'A%' 
    AND t.production_year > 2000
    AND c.country_code = 'USA'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_aka AS (
    SELECT id, person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name LIKE 'A%'
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
filtered_companies AS (
    SELECT id, name
    FROM company_name
    WHERE country_code = 'USA'
),
core AS (
    SELECT
        fa.id AS aka_id,
        fa.name AS aka_name,
        ft.title AS movie_title,
        ft.production_year,
        fa.person_id,
        ft.id AS movie_id,
        fc.name AS company_name
    FROM filtered_aka fa
    INNER JOIN cast_info ci ON fa.person_id = ci.person_id
    INNER JOIN filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
    INNER JOIN movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
    INNER JOIN filtered_companies fc ON mc.company_id = fc.id
)
SELECT
    core.aka_id,
    core.aka_name,
    core.movie_title,
    core.company_name,
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM core
LEFT JOIN person_info p ON core.person_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON core.movie_id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
ORDER BY
    core.production_year DESC,
    core.aka_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year = 2020 
    AND k.keyword ILIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.title;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year = 2020
),
filtered_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword ILIKE '%action%'
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    fk.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN
    movie_info m ON ft.id = m.movie_id
JOIN
    filtered_keywords fk ON ft.id = fk.movie_id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY
    a.name, ft.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS role,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    co.name AS company_name,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
    AND co.country_code = 'USA'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH base_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
cast_data AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, c.id AS cast_id, c.person_id, c.role_id, c.note
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
),
company_data AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, co.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    WHERE co.country_code = 'USA'
)
SELECT 
    bm.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS role,
    cd.note AS cast_note,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    cod.name AS company_name,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    base_movies bm
JOIN 
    cast_data cd ON bm.id = cd.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON cd.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON cd.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    company_data cod ON bm.id = cod.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON bm.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON bm.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
ORDER BY 
    bm.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        mt.id AS movie_id,
        mt.title AS movie_title,
        mt.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS actor_count,
        AVG(CASE WHEN ca.nr_order IS NOT NULL THEN ca.nr_order END) AS avg_order
    FROM 
        aka_title mt
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON mt.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info ca ON cc.subject_id = ca.id
    WHERE 
        mt.production_year >= 2000
    GROUP BY 
        mt.id, mt.title, mt.production_year
),
MovieCompanies AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.id) AS company_count
    FROM 
        movie_companies mc
    JOIN 
        company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    GROUP BY 
        mc.movie_id
),
MovieKeywords AS (
    SELECT 
        mk.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT k.id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        movie_keyword mk
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    GROUP BY 
        mk.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    rm.movie_id,
    rm.movie_title,
    rm.production_year,
    rm.actor_count,
    mc.company_count,
    mk.keyword_count,
    (rm.actor_count * 0.4 + mc.company_count * 0.3 + mk.keyword_count * 0.3) AS performance_score
FROM 
    RankedMovies rm
LEFT JOIN 
    MovieCompanies mc ON rm.movie_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    MovieKeywords mk ON rm.movie_id = mk.movie_id
WHERE 
    rm.avg_order > 5
ORDER BY 
    performance_score DESC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
SELECT 
    rm.movie_id,
    rm.movie_title,
    rm.production_year,
    rm.actor_count,
    mc.company_count,
    mk.keyword_count,
    (rm.actor_count * 0.4 + mc.company_count * 0.3 + mk.keyword_count * 0.3) AS performance_score
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            mt.id AS movie_id,
            mt.title AS movie_title,
            mt.production_year,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS actor_count,
            AVG(CASE WHEN ca.nr_order IS NOT NULL THEN ca.nr_order END) AS avg_order
        FROM 
            aka_title mt
        JOIN 
            complete_cast cc ON mt.id = cc.movie_id
        JOIN 
            cast_info ca ON cc.subject_id = ca.id
        WHERE 
            mt.production_year >= 2000
        GROUP BY 
            mt.id, mt.title, mt.production_year
        HAVING 
            AVG(CASE WHEN ca.nr_order IS NOT NULL THEN ca.nr_order END) > 5
    ) rm
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            mc.movie_id,
            COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count
        FROM 
            movie_companies mc
        WHERE 
            EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM company_name cn WHERE cn.id = mc.company_id)
        GROUP BY 
            mc.movie_id
    ) mc ON rm.movie_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            mk.movie_id,
            COUNT(DISTINCT mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
        FROM 
            movie_keyword mk
        WHERE 
            EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM keyword k WHERE k.id = mk.keyword_id)
        GROUP BY 
            mk.movie_id
    ) mk ON rm.movie_id = mk.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    performance_score DESC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ci.note AS cast_note,
    ti.info AS movie_additional_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON cc.subject_id = co.imdb_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND k.keyword IN ('Action', 'Drama')
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH movie_keywords_filtered AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword IN ('Action', 'Drama')
),
recent_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_keywords_filtered mkf WHERE mkf.movie_id = t.id)
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM complete_cast cc JOIN company_name co ON cc.subject_id = co.imdb_id WHERE cc.movie_id = t.id)
),
movie_info_details AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ti.info AS movie_additional_info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM recent_movies rm WHERE rm.id = mi.movie_id)
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rm.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ci.note AS cast_note,
    mid.movie_additional_info AS movie_additional_info
FROM
    recent_movies rm
JOIN cast_info ci ON rm.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON rm.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id AND k.keyword IN ('Action', 'Drama')
JOIN movie_info_details mid ON rm.id = mid.movie_id
ORDER BY
    a.name, rm.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    pi.info AS person_info,
    COUNT(mk.id) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND pi.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, ct.kind, pi.info
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH keyword_counts AS (
    SELECT movie_id, COUNT(id) AS keyword_count
    FROM movie_keyword
    GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    pi.info AS person_info,
    COALESCE(kc.keyword_count, 0) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'Biography'
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword_counts kc ON t.id = kc.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, ct.kind, pi.info, kc.keyword_count
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, a.name ASC;

sql2:
WITH recent_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, kind_id, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
distributor_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cn.name AS company_name, ct.kind AS cast_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id

SELECT

JOIN

JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON rt.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id

sql1:
WITH MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        c.kind AS company_type,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        r.role AS role_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT kw.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = cc.movie_id AND ci.id = cc.subject_id
    JOIN 
        aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = t.id
    JOIN 
        company_type c ON c.id = mc.company_type_id
    JOIN 
        role_type r ON r.id = ci.role_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = t.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword kw ON kw.id = mk.keyword_id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year >= 2000
        AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year, c.kind, a.name, r.role
),
RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        md.*, 
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY md.production_year ORDER BY md.keyword_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        MovieDetails md
)
SELECT 
    movie_title, 
    production_year, 
    company_type, 
    actor_name, 
    role_name, 
    keyword_count
FROM 
    RankedMovies
WHERE 
    rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    production_year DESC, keyword_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.movie_title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.company_type,
    sub.actor_name,
    sub.role_name,
    sub.keyword_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        c.kind AS company_type,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        r.role AS role_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT kw.keyword) AS keyword_count,
        RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY t.production_year
            ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT kw.keyword) DESC
        ) AS rnk
    FROM
        title t
    JOIN
        kind_type kt ON kt.id = t.kind_id AND kt.kind = 'movie'
    JOIN
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN
        cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = cc.movie_id AND ci.id = cc.subject_id
    JOIN
        aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN
        movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = t.id
    JOIN
        company_type c ON c.id = mc.company_type_id
    JOIN
        role_type r ON r.id = ci.role_id
    LEFT JOIN
        movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = t.id
    LEFT JOIN
        keyword kw ON kw.id = mk.keyword_id
    WHERE
        t.production_year >= 2000
    GROUP BY
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year, c.kind, a.name, r.role
) sub
WHERE
    sub.rnk <= 5
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC, sub.keyword_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND c.kind LIKE 'Film%'
    AND pi.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info LIKE '%actor%')
ORDER BY

sql2:
WITH filtered_info_types AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM info_type
    WHERE info LIKE '%actor%'
),
recent_movies AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
film_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind LIKE 'Film%'
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rm.title AS movie_title,
    fc.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_info_types fit ON pi.info_type_id = fit.id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    recent_movies rm ON ci.movie_id = rm.id
JOIN
    film_companies fc ON rm.id = fc.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON rm.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
ORDER BY
    a.name, rm.title
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    co.name AS company_name,
    m.info AS movie_additional_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    AND c.kind LIKE '%Lead%'
    AND m.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Budget')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH budget_info AS (
    SELECT it.id AS info_type_id
    FROM info_type it
    WHERE it.info = 'Budget'
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
lead_cast AS (
    SELECT c.id, c.kind
    FROM comp_cast_type c
    WHERE c.kind LIKE '%Lead%'
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    lc.kind AS cast_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    co.name AS company_name,
    m.info AS movie_additional_info
FROM 
    cast_info ci
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    lead_cast lc ON ci.person_role_id = lc.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON ft.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    budget_info bi ON m.info_type_id = bi.info_type_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY 
    ft.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS comp_cast_type,
    m.name AS production_company,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND c.kind IN ('actor', 'director')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
filtered_cast_types AS (
    SELECT id, kind
    FROM comp_cast_type
    WHERE kind IN ('actor', 'director')
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        ft.title AS movie_title,
        ft.production_year,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        a.person_id,
        fct.kind AS comp_cast_type,
        ft.id AS movie_id
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    INNER JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
    INNER JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.id = ci.id
    INNER JOIN filtered_cast_types fct ON ci.person_role_id = fct.id
    INNER JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
with_companies AS (
    SELECT
        b.movie_title,
        b.production_year,
        b.actor_name,
        b.person_id,
        b.comp_cast_type,
        cn.name AS production_company,
        b.movie_id
    FROM base b
    INNER JOIN movie_companies mc ON b.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    INNER JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
)
SELECT
    wc.movie_title,
    wc.actor_name,
    wc.comp_cast_type,
    wc.production_company,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM with_companies wc
LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON wc.movie_id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN person_info pi ON wc.person_id = pi.person_id
ORDER BY
    wc.production_year DESC,
    wc.actor_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.kind AS cast_type, 
    p.info AS person_info, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
ORDER BY

    t.production_year DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH bio_persons AS (
    SELECT p.person_id, p.info
    FROM person_info p
    JOIN info_type it ON p.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE it.info = 'Biography'
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.kind AS cast_type, 
    bp.info AS person_info, 
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    bio_persons bp ON a.person_id = bp.person_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id AND t.production_year >= 2000
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_kw mkw ON t.id = mkw.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    a.name, 
    t.production_year DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    t.production_year, 
    c.kind AS company_type, 
    COUNT(k.keyword) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    a.name IS NOT NULL AND 
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, t.production_year, c.kind
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, t.production_year DESC, actor_name ASC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH kw_counts AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, COUNT(k.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    GROUP BY mk.movie_id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    COALESCE(kc.keyword_count, 0) AS keyword_count
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN
    kw_counts kc ON t.id = kc.movie_id
WHERE
    a.name IS NOT NULL AND
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY
    a.name, t.title, t.production_year, c.kind, kc.keyword_count
ORDER BY
    keyword_count DESC, t.production_year DESC, actor_name ASC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
WITH film_details AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        ak.name AS actor_name,
        r.role AS role_name,
        c.note AS cast_note,

    JOIN 
        role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    JOIN 
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id

sql1:
WITH filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT t.title, t.production_year, t.id AS movie_id
    FROM title t
    JOIN aka_title at ON t.id = at.movie_id
    WHERE at.production_year >= 2000 AND at.kind_id IN (1, 2)
),
cast_and_crew AS (
    SELECT ak.name AS actor_name, c.role_id, mc.movie_id
    FROM cast_info c
    JOIN aka_name ak ON c.person_id = ak.person_id
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON c.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name cm ON mc.company_id = cm.id
    WHERE ak.name IS NOT NULL
),
movie_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT fm.title, fm.production_year, c.actor_name, c.role_id, ck.keyword
FROM filtered_movies fm
JOIN cast_and_crew c ON fm.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN movie_keywords ck ON fm.movie_id = ck.movie_id
WHERE ck.keyword LIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY fm.production_year DESC, fm.title ASC;
sql2:
SELECT t.title,
       t.production_year,
       ak.name AS actor_name,
       c.role_id,
       k.keyword
FROM title t
JOIN aka_title at ON t.id = at.movie_id
JOIN cast_info c ON t.id = c.movie_id
JOIN aka_name ak ON c.person_id = ak.person_id
JOIN movie_companies mc ON c.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN company_name cm ON mc.company_id = cm.id
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE at.production_year >= 2000
  AND at.kind_id IN (1, 2)
  AND ak.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, t.title ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    ak.name AS aka_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    t.production_year, 
    c.person_role_id, 
    r.role, 
    co.name AS company_name, 
    g.kind AS genre, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword 
FROM 
    aka_name ak 
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id 
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id 
JOIN 
    kind_type g ON t.kind_id = g.id 
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND co.country_code = 'USA' 
    AND k.keyword LIKE '%action%' 
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, ak.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, co.name AS company_name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    WHERE co.country_code = 'USA'
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
),
recent_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
)
SELECT
    ak.name AS aka_name,
    rt.title AS movie_title,
    rt.production_year,
    c.person_role_id,
    r.role,
    uc.company_name,
    g.kind AS genre,
    ak2.movie_keyword
FROM
    recent_titles rt
JOIN cast_info c ON rt.id = c.movie_id
JOIN aka_name ak ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN kind_type g ON rt.kind_id = g.id
JOIN usa_companies uc ON rt.id = uc.movie_id
JOIN action_keywords ak2 ON rt.id = ak2.movie_id
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC, ak.name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020 
    AND c.kind = 'actor' 
    AND m.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'box office')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH box_office_type AS (
    SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'box office'
),
filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
actor_cast AS (
    SELECT ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind = 'actor'
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    fm.title AS movie_title,
    ac.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    actor_cast ac
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ac.person_id
JOIN 
    filtered_movies fm ON ac.movie_id = fm.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON fm.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON fm.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    box_office_type bt ON m.info_type_id = bt.id
ORDER BY 
    fm.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ti.info AS movie_info,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    rt.role AS role_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN 
    role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND a.imdb_index IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        a.name AS actor_name,
        ci.movie_id,
        ci.person_role_id,
        ci.role_id
    FROM
        aka_name a
    JOIN
        cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
    WHERE
        a.imdb_index IS NOT NULL
),
movies AS (
    SELECT
        b.actor_name,
        b.person_role_id,
        b.role_id,
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year
    FROM
        base b
    JOIN
        title t ON b.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE
        t.production_year >= 2000
)
SELECT
    m.actor_name,
    m.movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ti.info AS movie_info,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    rt.role AS role_type
FROM
    movies m
JOIN
    comp_cast_type c ON m.person_role_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON m.movie_id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_info mi ON m.movie_id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON m.movie_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
LEFT JOIN
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN
    role_type rt ON m.role_id = rt.id
ORDER BY
    m.production_year DESC,
    m.actor_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
AND 
    c.kind LIKE 'Production%'
AND 
    k.keyword IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
prod_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind LIKE 'Production%'
),
valid_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    ft.production_year,
    pc.kind AS company_type,
    vk.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    prod_companies pc ON ft.id = pc.movie_id
JOIN
    valid_keywords vk ON ft.id = vk.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.role_id AS role_id,
    mc.note AS company_note,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000 
    AND cn.country_code = 'USA'
    AND k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, actor_name;
sql2:
WITH usa_movies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, mc.note AS company_note
    FROM movie_companies mc
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM company_name cn
        WHERE cn.id = mc.company_id AND cn.country_code = 'USA'
    )
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.role_id AS role_id,
    um.company_note AS company_note,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    usa_movies um ON t.id = um.movie_id
JOIN
    action_keywords ak ON t.id = ak.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC, actor_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
    AND p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
    AND c.kind IN (SELECT kind FROM comp_cast_type WHERE kind LIKE 'Actor%')
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, c.kind, p.info
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) > 5
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.title;
sql2:
WITH bio_type AS (
    SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography'
),
actor_kinds AS (
    SELECT kind FROM comp_cast_type WHERE kind LIKE 'Actor%'
),
kw_counts AS (
    SELECT
        a.name AS actor_name,
        t.title AS movie_title,
        c.kind AS cast_type,
        p.info AS person_info,
        COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM
        aka_name a
    JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
    JOIN comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
    JOIN actor_kinds ak ON c.kind = ak.kind
    LEFT JOIN person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
        AND p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM bio_type)
    LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE
        t.production_year >= 2000
        AND t.production_year <= 2023
    GROUP BY
        a.name, t.title, c.kind, p.info
)
SELECT actor_name, movie_title, cast_type, person_info, keyword_count
FROM kw_counts
WHERE keyword_count > 5
ORDER BY actor_name, movie_title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    kt.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name AS a
JOIN 
    cast_info AS c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title AS t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies AS mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_name AS cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword AS mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword AS kt ON mk.keyword_id = kt.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info AS mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND a.name LIKE '%Chris%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    c.nr_order;
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        a.name AS actor_name,
        c.nr_order AS cast_order,
        t.id AS t_id,
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year
    FROM
        aka_name AS a
    JOIN
        cast_info AS c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
    JOIN
        aka_title AS t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
    WHERE
        t.production_year >= 2000
        AND a.name LIKE '%Chris%'
)
SELECT
    b.actor_name,
    b.movie_title,
    b.cast_order,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    kt.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM
    base AS b
LEFT JOIN
    movie_companies AS mc ON b.t_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    company_name AS cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_keyword AS mk ON b.t_id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    keyword AS kt ON mk.keyword_id = kt.id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_info AS mi ON b.t_id = mi.movie_id
ORDER BY
    b.production_year DESC,
    b.cast_order;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
),
TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id, 
        title, 
        production_year,
        cast_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cast_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        RankedMovies
)
SELECT 
    tm.movie_id,
    tm.title,
    tm.production_year,
    tm.cast_count,
    COALESCE(cn.name, 'Unknown') AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    TopMovies tm
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON tm.movie_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON tm.movie_id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    tm.rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    tm.rank, tm.production_year DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.movie_id,
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.cast_count,
    COALESCE(cn.name, 'Unknown') AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM (
    SELECT
        rm.movie_id,
        rm.title,
        rm.production_year,
        rm.cast_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY rm.cast_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t.id AS movie_id,
            t.title,
            t.production_year,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
        FROM
            aka_title t
            INNER JOIN complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
            INNER JOIN cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
        GROUP BY
            t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    ) rm
) sub
LEFT JOIN movie_companies mc ON sub.movie_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
LEFT JOIN movie_keyword mk ON sub.movie_id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE sub.rank <= 10
ORDER BY sub.rank, sub.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS casting_type,
    p.info AS actor_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id AND p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000 
    AND c.kind = 'actor'
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH bio AS (
    SELECT id AS bio_id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography'
),
actor_type AS (
    SELECT id AS type_id FROM comp_cast_type WHERE kind = 'actor'
),
filtered_person_info AS (
    SELECT p.person_id, p.info
    FROM person_info p, bio b
    WHERE p.info_type_id = b.bio_id
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    'actor' AS casting_type,
    fp.info AS actor_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    cast_info ci
JOIN 
    actor_type at ON ci.person_role_id = at.type_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    filtered_person_info fp ON a.person_id = fp.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.production_year DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    ak.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    it.info AS movie_info,
    COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    aka_name ak
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title at ON c.movie_id = at.movie_id
JOIN 
    title t ON at.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND cn.country_code = 'USA'
GROUP BY 
    ak.name, t.title, c.nr_order, cn.name, it.info
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, t.title ASC;
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        ak.name AS aka_name,
        t.title AS movie_title,
        c.nr_order AS cast_order,
        cn.name AS company_name,
        it.info AS movie_info,
        t.id AS movie_id
    FROM 
        aka_name ak
    JOIN 
        cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
    JOIN 
        aka_title at ON c.movie_id = at.movie_id
    JOIN 
        title t ON at.movie_id = t.id
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN 
        movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
    JOIN 
        info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year >= 2000
        AND cn.country_code = 'USA'
),
kw_counts AS (
    SELECT movie_id, COUNT(keyword_id) AS cnt
    FROM movie_keyword
    GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT 
    b.aka_name,
    b.movie_title,
    b.cast_order,
    b.company_name,
    b.movie_info,
    COALESCE(SUM(k.cnt), 0) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    base b
LEFT JOIN 
    kw_counts k ON b.movie_id = k.movie_id
GROUP BY 
    b.aka_name, b.movie_title, b.cast_order, b.company_name, b.movie_info
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, b.movie_title ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
  AND 
    a.name IS NOT NULL
  AND 
    p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;
sql2:
WITH bio_type AS (
    SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography'
),
movie_keys AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
actor_info AS (
    SELECT a.person_id, a.name, p.info
    FROM aka_name a
    JOIN person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
    JOIN bio_type bt ON p.info_type_id = bt.id
    WHERE a.name IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ai.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    ai.info AS person_info,
    mk.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
JOIN 
    actor_info ai ON c.person_id = ai.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_keys mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.title, ai.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    t.production_year,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
WHERE 
    a.name LIKE '%Smith%'
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
    AND c.kind IN (SELECT kind FROM company_type WHERE kind LIKE 'Producer%')
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, c.kind, t.production_year, k.keyword
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC,
    a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_actors AS (
    SELECT person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name LIKE '%Smith%'
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
valid_cast_kinds AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cct.id, cct.kind
    FROM comp_cast_type cct
    JOIN company_type ct ON cct.kind = ct.kind
    WHERE ct.kind LIKE 'Producer%'
)
SELECT 
    fa.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    vck.kind AS cast_type,
    ft.production_year,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    filtered_actors fa
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON fa.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN 
    valid_cast_kinds vck ON ci.person_role_id = vck.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM complete_cast cc WHERE cc.movie_id = ft.id)
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_companies mc JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id WHERE mc.movie_id = ft.id)
GROUP BY 
    fa.name, ft.title, vck.kind, ft.production_year, k.keyword
ORDER BY 
    ft.production_year DESC,
    fa.name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS person_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.note AS role_note,
    co.name AS company_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    ti.kind AS movie_kind,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    kind_type ti ON t.kind_id = ti.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND co.country_code = 'USA'

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.kind_id, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
filtered_aka AS (
    SELECT a.person_id, a.name

    WHERE a.surname_pcode IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_companies AS (
    SELECT co.id, co.name
    FROM company_name co
    WHERE co.country_code = 'USA'
)
SELECT 
    fa.name AS person_name,

    c.note AS role_note,

JOIN 
    filtered_companies fc ON mc.company_id = fc.id

sql1:
SELECT 
    ak.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    c.name AS company_name,
    p.info AS person_info,
    cn.name AS character_name
FROM 
    aka_name ak
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON ak.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON cc.subject_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    char_name cn ON p.person_id = cn.imdb_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
    AND c.country_code = 'USA'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    ak.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH movie_filter AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    INNER JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
),
usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    INNER JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    WHERE c.country_code = 'USA'
),
cast_aka AS (
    SELECT ci.movie_id, ci.person_id, ak.name AS aka_name
    FROM cast_info ci
    INNER JOIN aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
),
cc_person AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, p.person_id, p.info
    FROM complete_cast cc
    INNER JOIN person_info p ON cc.subject_id = p.person_id
)
SELECT
    ca.aka_name AS aka_name,
    mf.title AS movie_title,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    uc.name AS company_name,
    cp.info AS person_info,
    cn.name AS character_name
FROM
    movie_filter mf
INNER JOIN action_keywords ak ON mf.id = ak.movie_id
INNER JOIN usa_companies uc ON mf.id = uc.movie_id
INNER JOIN cast_aka ca ON mf.id = ca.movie_id
INNER JOIN cc_person cp ON mf.id = cp.movie_id
INNER JOIN char_name cn ON cp.person_id = cn.imdb_id
ORDER BY
    mf.production_year DESC,
    ca.aka_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS comp_cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS actor_info
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id AND p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    AND c.kind <> 'uncredited'
    AND a.name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH bio_type AS (
    SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography'
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        a.person_id,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        ci.movie_id,
        ci.person_role_id
    FROM
        aka_name a
    INNER JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
    WHERE
        a.name IS NOT NULL
),
movie_data AS (
    SELECT
        b.person_id,
        b.actor_name,
        b.person_role_id,
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year
    FROM
        base b
    INNER JOIN title t ON b.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE
        t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
filtered AS (
    SELECT
        md.person_id,
        md.actor_name,
        md.movie_id,
        md.movie_title,
        md.production_year,
        c.kind AS comp_cast_type
    FROM
        movie_data md
    INNER JOIN complete_cast cc ON md.movie_id = cc.movie_id
    INNER JOIN comp_cast_type c ON md.person_role_id = c.id
    WHERE
        c.kind <> 'uncredited'
)
SELECT
    f.actor_name,
    f.movie_title,
    f.production_year,
    f.comp_cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS actor_info
FROM
    filtered f
INNER JOIN movie_keyword mk ON f.movie_id = mk.movie_id
INNER JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN person_info p ON f.person_id = p.person_id
    AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM bio_type)
ORDER BY
    f.production_year DESC,
    f.actor_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pm.info AS personal_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    person_info pm ON cc.subject_id = pm.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000 
    AND a.name IS NOT NULL 
    AND k.keyword IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, ct.kind, k.keyword, pm.info, t.production_year
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_aka AS (
    SELECT person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
filtered_keywords AS (
    SELECT id, keyword
    FROM keyword
    WHERE keyword IS NOT NULL
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, fk.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN filtered_keywords fk ON mk.keyword_id = fk.id
),
movie_ct AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
),
cast_persons AS (
    SELECT ci.movie_id, fa.name AS actor_name
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN filtered_aka fa ON ci.person_id = fa.person_id
)
SELECT 
    cp.actor_name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    mct.kind AS company_type,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pm.info AS personal_info
FROM 
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN 
    cast_persons cp ON ft.movie_id = cp.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_ct mct ON ft.id = mct.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_kw mkw ON ft.id = mkw.movie_id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    person_info pm ON cc.subject_id = pm.person_id
GROUP BY 
    cp.actor_name, ft.title, mct.kind, mkw.keyword, pm.info, ft.production_year
ORDER BY 
    ft.production_year DESC, 
    cp.actor_name;

sql1:
WITH ranked_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        tt.title, 
        tt.production_year, 
        an.name AS actor_name, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT kw.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        aka_title tt
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON tt.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    JOIN 
        aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON tt.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword kw ON mk.keyword_id = kw.id
    WHERE 
        tt.production_year >= 2000
    GROUP BY 
        tt.title, tt.production_year, an.name
    ORDER BY 
        keyword_count DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
SELECT 
    rm.title, 
    rm.production_year, 
    rm.actor_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS production_companies
FROM 
    ranked_movies rm
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON rm.title = (SELECT title FROM aka_title WHERE id = mc.movie_id)
GROUP BY 
    rm.title, rm.production_year, rm.actor_name
ORDER BY 
    production_companies DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    rm.title, 
    rm.production_year, 
    rm.actor_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS production_companies
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            tt.id AS tt_id,
            tt.title, 
            tt.production_year, 
            an.name AS actor_name, 
            COUNT(DISTINCT kw.keyword) AS keyword_count
        FROM 
            aka_title tt
        JOIN 
            complete_cast cc ON tt.id = cc.movie_id
        JOIN 
            cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
        JOIN 
            aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
        LEFT JOIN 
            movie_keyword mk ON tt.id = mk.movie_id
        LEFT JOIN 
            keyword kw ON mk.keyword_id = kw.id
        WHERE 
            tt.production_year >= 2000
        GROUP BY 
            tt.id, tt.title, tt.production_year, an.name
        ORDER BY 
            keyword_count DESC
        LIMIT 10
    ) rm
JOIN 
    aka_title at2 ON rm.title = at2.title
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON at2.id = mc.movie_id
GROUP BY 
    rm.title, rm.production_year, rm.actor_name
ORDER BY 
    production_companies DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title, 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    c.kind AS cast_type, 
    m.name AS production_company, 
    COUNT(k.keyword) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2023
    AND t.kind_id IN (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind IN ('Movie', 'Series'))
GROUP BY 
    t.id, actor_name, cast_type, production_company
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, keyword_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
sql2:
WITH kw_counts AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, COUNT(k.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    GROUP BY mk.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    t.title, 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    c.kind AS cast_type, 
    m.name AS production_company, 
    COALESCE(kc.keyword_count, 0) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    kind_type kt ON t.kind_id = kt.id AND kt.kind IN ('Movie', 'Series')
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN 
    kw_counts kc ON t.id = kc.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2023
GROUP BY 
    t.id, actor_name, cast_type, production_company, kc.keyword_count
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, keyword_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

sql2:
WITH usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, co.name AS company_name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    WHERE co.country_code = 'USA'
),

),
movie_kw AS (

SELECT

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    m.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN

JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON m.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN

sql2:
WITH filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
production_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cn.id AS company_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind = 'Production'
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    fm.title AS movie_title,
    pc.company_type AS company_type,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM
    aka_name a

    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_movies fm ON ci.movie_id = fm.id
JOIN
    production_companies pc ON fm.id = pc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_kw mkw ON fm.id = mkw.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
        AND pi.info_type_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    fm.production_year DESC,
    a.name,
    fm.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.id AS title_id,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.person_id,
    p.info AS person_info,
    ct.kind AS casting_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    role_type rt ON c.role_id = rt.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type ct ON c.person_role_id = ct.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    AND k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
    AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH bio_type AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM info_type
    WHERE info = 'Biography'
),
action_movies AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
)
SELECT 
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.id AS title_id,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.person_id,
    p.info AS person_info,
    ct.kind AS casting_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    action_movies am ON t.id = am.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM movie_keyword mk2 
        WHERE mk2.movie_id = t.id AND mk2.keyword_id = k.id
        AND k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
    )
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type rt ON c.role_id = rt.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    bio_type bt ON p.info_type_id = bt.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type ct ON c.person_role_id = ct.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND t.production_year <= 2020
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name

sql1:
WITH ranked_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(mk.id) AS keyword_count
    FROM 
        title t
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        aka_title at ON t.id = at.movie_id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year >= 2000
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    ORDER BY 
        keyword_count DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
cast_roles AS (
    SELECT 
        ci.movie_id,
        rt.role,
        COUNT(ci.person_id) AS role_count
    FROM 
        cast_info ci
    JOIN 
        role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
    WHERE 
        ci.nr_order < 5
    GROUP BY 
        ci.movie_id, rt.role
)
SELECT 
    rm.movie_id,
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    cr.role,
    cr.role_count,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    cn.country_code
FROM 
    ranked_movies rm
LEFT JOIN 
    cast_roles cr ON rm.movie_id = cr.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON rm.movie_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, rm.keyword_count DESC, cr.role_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    rm.movie_id,
    rm.title,
    rm.production_year,
    cr.role,
    cr.role_count,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    cn.country_code
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            t.id AS movie_id,
            t.title,
            t.production_year,
            COUNT(mk.id) AS keyword_count
        FROM 
            title t
        LEFT JOIN 
            movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
        LEFT JOIN 
            movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
        LEFT JOIN 
            company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
        LEFT JOIN 
            aka_title at ON t.id = at.movie_id
        WHERE 
            t.production_year >= 2000
        GROUP BY 
            t.id, t.title, t.production_year
        ORDER BY 
            keyword_count DESC
        LIMIT 10
    ) rm
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            ci.movie_id,
            rt.role,
            COUNT(ci.person_id) AS role_count
        FROM 
            cast_info ci
        JOIN 
            role_type rt ON ci.role_id = rt.id
        WHERE 
            ci.nr_order < 5
        GROUP BY 
            ci.movie_id, rt.role
    ) cr ON rm.movie_id = cr.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON rm.movie_id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, rm.keyword_count DESC, cr.role_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.nr_order AS cast_order, 
    p.name AS person_name, 
    cn.name AS company_name, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    ti.info AS movie_info 
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE 
    a.name IS NOT NULL
    AND t.production_year > 2000
    AND k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, c.nr_order ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
),
movie_company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cn.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
),
movie_type_info AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ti.info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    fm.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    p.name AS person_name,
    mci.name AS company_name,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    mti.info AS movie_info
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
JOIN
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_movies fm ON c.movie_id = fm.id
JOIN
    action_keywords ak ON fm.id = ak.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_company_info mci ON fm.id = mci.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_type_info mti ON fm.id = mti.movie_id
WHERE
    a.name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    fm.production_year DESC, c.nr_order ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    r.role AS role_name
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    AND m.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'box office' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name ASC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:

)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,

JOIN 
    box_office_type bt ON m.info_type_id = bt.id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
ORDER BY

LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.nr_order AS cast_order, 
    p.info AS person_info, 
    co.name AS company_name, 
    ci.kind AS company_type 
FROM 
    aka_name a 
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id 
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id 
JOIN 
    company_type ci ON mc.company_type_id = ci.id 
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023 
    AND ci.kind = 'Production' 
    AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography') 
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    c.nr_order ASC;
sql2:
WITH bio AS (
    SELECT id AS info_type_id
    FROM info_type
    WHERE info = 'Biography'
),
prod_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, co.name AS company_name, ci.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    JOIN company_type ci ON mc.company_type_id = ci.id
    WHERE ci.kind = 'Production'
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    p.info AS person_info,
    pc.company_name,
    pc.company_type
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    bio b ON p.info_type_id = b.info_type_id
JOIN
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    prod_companies pc ON t.id = pc.movie_id
WHERE
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC,
    c.nr_order ASC;

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
filtered_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE ct.kind LIKE 'Production%'
),
title_keywords AS (

    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)

    a.name AS actor_name,

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    ct.kind AS company_type, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name AS a 
JOIN 
    cast_info AS ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id 
JOIN 
    title AS t ON ci.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies AS mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_name AS cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id 
JOIN 
    company_type AS ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id 
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword AS mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword AS k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info AS pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND ct.kind = 'Distributor' 
    AND pi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Birthdate') 
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, ct.kind, k.keyword, pi.info
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.title 
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH movie_dist AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies AS mc
    JOIN company_name AS cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type AS ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE ct.kind = 'Distributor'
),
kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword AS mk
    JOIN keyword AS k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    md.company_type, 
    kw.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name AS a 
JOIN 
    person_info AS pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id 
JOIN 
    info_type AS it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'Birthdate'
JOIN 
    cast_info AS ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id 
JOIN 
    title AS t ON ci.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    movie_dist AS md ON t.id = md.movie_id 
LEFT JOIN 
    kw ON t.id = kw.movie_id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, md.company_type, kw.keyword, pi.info
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.title 
LIMIT 100;

sql2:

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    p.info AS actor_info,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND p.info_type_id IN (
        SELECT id 
        FROM info_type 
        WHERE info IN ('biography', 'awards')
    )
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;
sql2:
WITH actor_info AS (
    SELECT ci.person_id, cc.movie_id
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
),
movie_data AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
)
SELECT 
    md.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    p.info AS actor_info,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    movie_data md
JOIN 
    actor_info ai ON md.movie_id = ai.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ai.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON md.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON md.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON p.info_type_id = it.id
WHERE 
    it.info IN ('biography', 'awards')
ORDER BY 
    md.title, a.name;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(c.id) AS total_cast_members,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(c.id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        title t
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year >= 2000
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
), TopMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        rm.movie_id,
        rm.title,
        rm.production_year
    FROM 
        RankedMovies rm
    WHERE 
        rm.rank <= 5
)
SELECT 
    t.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    TopMovies t
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON ci.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Birth Date')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year, t.title, a.name;
sql2:
SELECT 
    t.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            sub.movie_id,
            sub.title,
            sub.production_year
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t.id AS movie_id,
                t.title,
                t.production_year,
                COUNT(ci.id) AS total_cast_members,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(ci.id) DESC) AS rank
            FROM 
                title t
            LEFT JOIN 
                complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
            LEFT JOIN 
                cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
            WHERE 
                t.production_year >= 2000
            GROUP BY 
                t.id, t.title, t.production_year
        ) sub
        WHERE 
            sub.rank <= 5
    ) t
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON ci.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON p.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'Birth Date'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year, t.title, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    co.name AS company_name,

FROM

JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN

LEFT JOIN

LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id

    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN

WHERE

    AND co.country_code = 'USA'
