sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
usa_companies AS (
    SELECT co.id, co.name
    FROM company_name co
    WHERE co.country_code = 'USA'
),
kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
mi_info AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ti.info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    uc.name AS company_name,
    kw.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    mi_info.info AS additional_info
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    cast_info c ON ft.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN
    usa_companies uc ON mc.company_id = uc.id
LEFT JOIN
    kw ON ft.id = kw.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    mi_info ON ft.id = mi_info.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    a.name ASC,
    c.nr_order ASC
LIMIT 100;

sql2:
WITH recent_movies AS (

    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE 'action%'
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rm.title AS movie_title,
    rm.production_year,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ci.note AS character_note
FROM
    cast_info ci
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    recent_movies rm ON ci.movie_id = rm.id
JOIN
    action_keywords ak ON rm.id = ak.movie_id
JOIN
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.role_id = c.id
ORDER BY
    rm.production_year DESC,
    a.name ASC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.note AS role_note,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
WHERE 
    a.name LIKE 'A%' 
    AND t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND ct.kind ILIKE '%Production%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_actors AS (
    SELECT person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name LIKE 'A%'
),
filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
filtered_company_types AS (
    SELECT id, kind
    FROM company_type
    WHERE kind ILIKE '%Production%'
),
actor_roles AS (
    SELECT fa.name AS actor_name,
           ft.id AS title_id,
           ft.title AS movie_title,
           ft.production_year,
           c.note AS role_note
    FROM filtered_actors fa
    JOIN cast_info c ON fa.person_id = c.person_id
    JOIN filtered_titles ft ON c.movie_id = ft.movie_id
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, fct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN filtered_company_types fct ON mc.company_type_id = fct.id
)
SELECT 
    ar.actor_name,
    ar.movie_title,
    ar.role_note,
    ci.company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    actor_roles ar
JOIN 
    company_info ci ON ar.title_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON ar.title_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON ar.title_id = m.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    ar.production_year DESC, ar.actor_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS Movie_Title, 
    a.name AS Actor_Name, 
    p.info AS Actor_Info, 
    c.kind AS Company_Type, 
    cnd.name AS Company_Name,
    k.keyword AS Movie_Keyword
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cnd ON mc.company_id = cnd.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    AND p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Birthdate')
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;
sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
movie_cast AS (
    SELECT mb.id AS movie_id, mb.title, a.name AS Actor_Name, a.person_id
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON mb.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
actor_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, mc.title, mc.Actor_Name, mc.person_id, p.info AS Actor_Info
    FROM movie_cast mc
    LEFT JOIN person_info p ON mc.person_id = p.person_id
    JOIN info_type it ON p.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'Birthdate'
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cnd.name AS Company_Name, c.kind AS Company_Type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cnd ON mc.company_id = cnd.id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS Movie_Keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    ai.title AS Movie_Title,
    ai.Actor_Name,
    ai.Actor_Info,
    mco.Company_Type,
    mco.Company_Name,
    mkw.Movie_Keyword
FROM
    actor_info ai
JOIN
    movie_comp mco ON ai.movie_id = mco.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_kw mkw ON ai.movie_id = mkw.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ai.title, ai.Actor_Name;

sql1:
WITH ranked_movies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        c.name AS company_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT k.id) AS keyword_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT k.id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        t.kind_id IN (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year, c.name
)
SELECT 
    rm.movie_title,
    rm.production_year,
    rm.company_name,
    rm.keyword_count
FROM 
    ranked_movies rm
WHERE 
    rm.rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, 
    rm.keyword_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.movie_title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.company_name,
    sub.keyword_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.title AS movie_title,
        t.production_year,
        c.name AS company_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT k.id) AS keyword_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT k.id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM
        aka_title t
    JOIN
        kind_type kt ON t.kind_id = kt.id AND kt.kind = 'movie'
    JOIN
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN
        company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    LEFT JOIN
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    GROUP BY
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year, c.name
) sub
WHERE
    sub.rank <= 5
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC,
    sub.keyword_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    AND c.kind IN ('Distributor', 'Production')
    AND m.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info LIKE '%release%')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name, t.title;
sql2:
WITH release_info AS (
    SELECT it.id AS info_type_id
    FROM info_type it
    WHERE it.info LIKE '%release%'
),
filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
filtered_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind IN ('Distributor', 'Production')
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    fm.title AS movie_title,
    fc.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM
    filtered_movies fm
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON fm.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_companies fc ON fm.movie_id = fc.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON fm.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN
    movie_info m ON fm.movie_id = m.movie_id
JOIN
    release_info ri ON m.info_type_id = ri.info_type_id
ORDER BY
    fm.production_year DESC, a.name, fm.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    ak.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    p.info AS person_info,
    comp.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name ak
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON ak.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name comp ON m.company_id = comp.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND ak.name IS NOT NULL
    AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'biography')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, c.nr_order ASC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
WITH bio_info AS (
    SELECT id AS info_type_id
    FROM info_type
    WHERE info = 'biography'
),
movie_data AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
)
SELECT 
    ak.name AS aka_name,
    md.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    p.info AS person_info,
    comp.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    movie_data md
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON md.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name ak ON ak.person_id = c.person_id
    AND ak.name IS NOT NULL
JOIN 
    person_info p ON ak.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    bio_info bi ON p.info_type_id = bi.info_type_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies m ON md.movie_id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name comp ON m.company_id = comp.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON md.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
ORDER BY 
    md.production_year DESC, c.nr_order ASC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    AND c.kind LIKE 'Production%'
    AND k.keyword IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
prod_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id
    FROM movie_companies mc
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM company_type c WHERE c.id = mc.company_type_id AND c.kind LIKE 'Production%'
    )
),
valid_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    ft.production_year,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    vk.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id AND c.kind LIKE 'Production%'
JOIN
    valid_keywords vk ON ft.id = vk.movie_id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        t.kind_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ka.person_id) AS actor_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ka.person_id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN 
        aka_name ka ON ci.person_id = ka.person_id
    GROUP BY 
        t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id
),
HighActorMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        title,
        production_year,
        kind_id,
        company_count,
        actor_count
    FROM 
        RankedMovies
    WHERE 
        rank <= 5
)
SELECT 
    ham.title,
    ham.production_year,
    kt.kind,
    ham.company_count,
    ham.actor_count
FROM 
    HighActorMovies ham
JOIN 
    kind_type kt ON ham.kind_id = kt.id
ORDER BY 
    ham.production_year, ham.actor_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    kt.kind,
    sub.company_count,
    sub.actor_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        t.kind_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT mc.company_id) AS company_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ka.person_id) AS actor_count
    FROM
        aka_title t
    JOIN
        movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN
        aka_name ka ON ci.person_id = ka.person_id
    GROUP BY
        t.title, t.production_year, t.kind_id
    HAVING
        (SELECT COUNT(*)
         FROM (
             SELECT
                 t2.title AS t2_title,
                 t2.production_year AS t2_py,
                 t2.kind_id AS t2_kid,
                 COUNT(DISTINCT ka2.person_id) AS ac2
             FROM
                 aka_title t2
             JOIN movie_companies mc2 ON t2.id = mc2.movie_id
             JOIN complete_cast cc2 ON t2.id = cc2.movie_id
             JOIN cast_info ci2 ON cc2.subject_id = ci2.person_id
             JOIN aka_name ka2 ON ci2.person_id = ka2.person_id
             WHERE t2.production_year = t.production_year
             GROUP BY t2.title, t2.production_year, t2.kind_id
             HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ka2.person_id) > COUNT(DISTINCT ka.person_id)
                 OR (COUNT(DISTINCT ka2.person_id) = COUNT(DISTINCT ka.person_id)
                     AND (t2.title, t2.kind_id) < (t.title, t.kind_id))
         ) rivals) < 5
) sub
JOIN
    kind_type kt ON sub.kind_id = kt.id
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year, sub.actor_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND c.kind LIKE 'Production%'
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, t.production_year, c.kind
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH production_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind LIKE 'Production%'
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    pc.kind AS company_type,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT k.keyword)
     FROM movie_keyword mk
     JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
     WHERE mk.movie_id = t.id) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    production_companies pc ON t.id = pc.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, t.production_year, pc.kind
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id 
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id 
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000 
    AND c.kind = 'Production' 
ORDER BY

sql2:
WITH prod_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id
    FROM movie_companies mc
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM company_type c WHERE c.id = mc.company_type_id AND c.kind = 'Production'
    )
),
recent_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rt.title AS movie_title,
    'Production' AS company_type,
    tk.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM
    recent_titles rt
JOIN
    prod_companies pc ON rt.id = pc.movie_id
JOIN
    title_keywords tk ON rt.id = tk.movie_id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON rt.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY
    a.name, rt.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    c.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS keyword,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name p ON ci.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND c.country_code = 'USA'
    AND r.role IN ('Actor', 'Director')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    p.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
filtered_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    WHERE c.country_code = 'USA'
),
filtered_roles AS (
    SELECT id, role
    FROM role_type
    WHERE role IN ('Actor', 'Director')
),
cast_actors AS (
    SELECT ci.id, ci.person_id, ci.role_id, ci.movie_id AS ci_movie_id
    FROM cast_info ci
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_roles fr WHERE fr.id = ci.role_id
    )
)
SELECT
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS actor_name,
    fr.role AS actor_role,
    fc.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS keyword,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN
    cast_actors ca ON cc.subject_id = ca.id
JOIN
    aka_name p ON ca.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_roles fr ON ca.role_id = fr.id
JOIN
    filtered_companies fc ON ft.id = fc.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN
    movie_info mi ON ft.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    p.name ASC;

sql1:
WITH RankedFilms AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS title_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        k.keyword,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.id ORDER BY t.production_year DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
TopTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        rf.title_id,
        rf.title,
        rf.production_year,
        rf.keyword
    FROM 
        RankedFilms rf
    WHERE 
        rf.rank = 1
)
SELECT 
    tt.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    TopTitles tt
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON tt.title_id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON tt.title_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON tt.title_id = mi.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = 1
WHERE 
    tt.production_year = 2022
ORDER BY 
    tt.title, a.name;
sql2:
SELECT 
    t.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = 1
WHERE 
    t.production_year = 2022
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM movie_keyword mk
        JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
        WHERE mk.movie_id = t.id
    )
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    p.info AS personal_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    m.info AS movie_information
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND p.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'biography')
    AND k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH bio_type AS (
    SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'biography'
),
action_kw AS (
    SELECT k.id, k.keyword
    FROM keyword k
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
),
recent_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rt.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    p.info AS personal_info,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    m.info AS movie_information
FROM
    recent_titles rt
JOIN
    movie_info m ON rt.id = m.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON rt.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    action_kw ak ON mk.keyword_id = ak.id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON rt.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    bio_type bt ON p.info_type_id = bt.id
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    akn.name AS aka_name,
    tit.title AS movie_title,
    pers.name AS person_name,
    grp.kind AS company_type,
    cnt.name AS company_name,
    tit.production_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT kw.keyword) AS keyword_count
FROM 
    aka_name akn
JOIN 
    cast_info cti ON akn.person_id = cti.person_id
JOIN 
    title tit ON cti.movie_id = tit.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON tit.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cnt ON mc.company_id = cnt.id
JOIN 
    company_type grp ON mc.company_type_id = grp.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mwk ON tit.id = mwk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword kw ON mwk.keyword_id = kw.id
JOIN 
    name pers ON akn.person_id = pers.imdb_id
WHERE 
    tit.production_year > 2000
    AND grp.kind = 'Production'
GROUP BY 
    akn.name, tit.title, pers.name, grp.kind, cnt.name, tit.production_year
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, tit.title ASC;
sql2:
WITH kw_counts AS (
    SELECT mwk.movie_id, COUNT(DISTINCT kw.keyword) AS keyword_count
    FROM movie_keyword mwk
    JOIN keyword kw ON mwk.keyword_id = kw.id
    GROUP BY mwk.movie_id
),
prod_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cnt.name AS company_name, grp.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cnt ON mc.company_id = cnt.id
    JOIN company_type grp ON mc.company_type_id = grp.id
    WHERE grp.kind = 'Production'
)
SELECT 
    akn.name AS aka_name,
    tit.title AS movie_title,
    pers.name AS person_name,
    pc.company_type,
    pc.company_name,
    tit.production_year,
    kc.keyword_count
FROM 
    title tit
JOIN 
    kw_counts kc ON tit.id = kc.movie_id
JOIN 
    prod_companies pc ON tit.id = pc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info cti ON tit.id = cti.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name akn ON cti.person_id = akn.person_id
JOIN 
    name pers ON akn.person_id = pers.imdb_id
WHERE 
    tit.production_year > 2000
GROUP BY 
    akn.name, tit.title, pers.name, pc.company_type, pc.company_name, tit.production_year, kc.keyword_count
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, tit.title ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    ct.kind AS company_type, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    pi.info AS actor_info 
FROM 
    aka_name a 
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id 
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id 
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id 
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000 
    AND cn.country_code = 'USA' 
    AND pi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'birth date') 
GROUP BY 
    a.name, 
    t.title, 
    ct.kind, 
    k.keyword, 
    pi.info, 
    t.production_year 
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH birth_info AS (
    SELECT pi.person_id, pi.info
    FROM person_info pi
    JOIN info_type it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE it.info = 'birth date'
),
usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM company_name cn
        WHERE cn.id = mc.company_id AND cn.country_code = 'USA'
    )
),
recent_movies AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rm.title AS movie_title,
    uc.company_type AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    bi.info AS actor_info
FROM
    aka_name a
    JOIN cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
    JOIN recent_movies rm ON c.movie_id = rm.id
    JOIN usa_companies uc ON rm.id = uc.movie_id
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON rm.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    JOIN birth_info bi ON a.person_id = bi.person_id
GROUP BY
    a.name,
    rm.title,
    uc.company_type,
    k.keyword,
    bi.info,
    rm.production_year
ORDER BY
    rm.production_year DESC,
    a.name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ci.role_id,
    cm.name AS company_name,
    COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_name cm ON mc.company_id = cm.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
AND 
    cm.country_code = 'USA'
GROUP BY 
    t.title, a.name, ci.role_id, cm.name, pi.info
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, t.title ASC;
sql2:
WITH kw_counts AS (
    SELECT movie_id, COUNT(keyword_id) AS keyword_count
    FROM movie_keyword
    GROUP BY movie_id
),
usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cm.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cm ON mc.company_id = cm.id
    WHERE cm.country_code = 'USA'
)
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ci.role_id,
    uc.name AS company_name,
    COALESCE(kc.keyword_count, 0) AS keyword_count,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    usa_companies uc ON t.id = uc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    kw_counts kc ON t.id = kc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY 
    t.title, a.name, ci.role_id, uc.name, pi.info, kc.keyword_count
ORDER BY 
    keyword_count DESC, t.title ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.name AS company_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND c.country_code = 'USA'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.name AS company_name, ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id AND c.country_code = 'USA'
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    a.id AS aka_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    uc.company_name,
    uc.company_type,
    p.info AS person_info,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN
    usa_companies uc ON ft.id = uc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_kw mkw ON ft.id = mkw.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC, a.name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    r.role AS character_name,
    m.name AS production_company,
    ki.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    i.info AS additional_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword ki ON mk.keyword_id = ki.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND m.country_code = 'USA'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, m.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
    WHERE m.country_code = 'USA'
),
recent_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, ki.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword ki ON mk.keyword_id = ki.id
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rt.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    r.role AS character_name,
    uc.name AS production_company,
    tk.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    i.info AS additional_info
FROM 
    recent_titles rt
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON rt.id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    usa_companies uc ON rt.id = uc.movie_id
JOIN 
    title_keywords tk ON rt.id = tk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON rt.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND c.kind LIKE '%Production%'
    AND m.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info LIKE '%box office%')
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.production_year DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH box_office_types AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM info_type
    WHERE info LIKE '%box office%'
),
production_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind LIKE '%Production%'
),
movie_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    pc.kind AS company_type,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    mks.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    title t
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    movie_info m ON m.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    box_office_types bot ON m.info_type_id = bot.id
JOIN
    production_companies pc ON pc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    movie_keywords mks ON mks.movie_id = t.id
WHERE
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY
    a.name, t.production_year DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title, 
    p.name AS person_name, 
    k.keyword, 
    c.kind AS company_type, 
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t 
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id 
JOIN 
    aka_name p ON ci.person_id = p.person_id 
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id 
JOIN 
    movie_info ti ON t.id = ti.movie_id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000 
    AND c.kind = 'Distributor' 
    AND ti.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Box Office')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    p.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH box_office_info AS (
    SELECT ti.movie_id, ti.info
    FROM movie_info ti
    JOIN info_type it ON ti.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE it.info = 'Box Office'
),
distributor_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE c.kind = 'Distributor'
)
SELECT
    t.title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    k.keyword,
    'Distributor' AS company_type,
    bo.info AS movie_info
FROM
    title t
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name p ON ci.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN
    distributor_companies dc ON t.id = dc.movie_id
JOIN
    box_office_info bo ON t.id = bo.movie_id
WHERE
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC,
    p.name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    t.production_year, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword, 
    c.kind AS cast_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020 
    AND k.keyword IN ('Action', 'Drama', 'Comedy')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
filtered_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword IN ('Action', 'Drama', 'Comedy')
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    ft.production_year,
    fk.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    c.kind AS cast_type
FROM
    cast_info ci
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    filtered_titles ft ON ci.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN
    filtered_keywords fk ON ft.id = fk.movie_id
JOIN
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
WHERE
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM complete_cast cc WHERE cc.movie_id = ft.id)
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    c.kind AS comp_cast_type,
    cp.name AS company_name,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cp ON mc.company_id = cp.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000 
    AND a.name IS NOT NULL 
    AND k.keyword IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM aka_title t
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
),
cast_actors AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, ci.person_id, ci.role_id
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
),
keyword_info AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword IS NOT NULL
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cp.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cp ON mc.company_id = cp.id
)
SELECT
    mb.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ki.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    c.kind AS comp_cast_type,
    co.name AS company_name,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM
    movie_base mb
JOIN
    cast_actors ca ON mb.id = ca.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ca.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    keyword_info ki ON mb.id = ki.movie_id
JOIN
    company_info co ON mb.id = co.movie_id
JOIN
    comp_cast_type c ON ca.role_id = c.id
JOIN
    movie_info mi ON mb.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE
    a.name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    mb.production_year DESC, a.name ASC;

sql1:
WITH ranked_titles AS (
    SELECT 
        t.title, 
        t.production_year, 
        k.keyword, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.title) AS rank,
        t.id
    FROM 
        title t
    INNER JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    INNER JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
), 
cast_details AS (
    SELECT 
        c.movie_id, 
        a.name AS actor_name, 
        r.role
    FROM 
        cast_info c
    INNER JOIN 
        aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
    INNER JOIN 
        role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        cn.name AS company_name,
        ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM 
        movie_companies mc
    INNER JOIN 
        company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    INNER JOIN 
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT 
    rt.title,
    rt.production_year,
    rt.keyword,
    cd.actor_name,
    cd.role,
    ci.company_name,
    ci.company_type
FROM 
    ranked_titles rt
LEFT JOIN 
    cast_details cd ON rt.id = cd.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_info ci ON rt.id = ci.movie_id
WHERE 
    rt.rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    rt.production_year DESC, rt.title ASC;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.title,
    sub.production_year,
    sub.keyword,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        k.keyword,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.title) AS rank
    FROM
        title t
    INNER JOIN
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    INNER JOIN
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
) sub
LEFT JOIN
    cast_info c ON sub.id = c.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
LEFT JOIN
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON sub.id = mc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
LEFT JOIN
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
WHERE
    sub.rank <= 5
ORDER BY
    sub.production_year DESC, sub.title ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    co.name AS company_name,
    mt.kind AS company_type,
    mi.info AS additional_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON t.id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    company_type mt ON mc.company_type_id = mt.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND co.country_code = 'USA'
    AND k.keyword IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, co.name AS company_name, mt.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    JOIN company_type mt ON mc.company_type_id = mt.id
    WHERE co.country_code = 'USA'
),
movie_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT 
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    uc.company_name,
    uc.company_type,
    mi.info AS additional_info,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ft.id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    usa_companies uc ON ft.id = uc.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keywords mkw ON ft.id = mkw.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON ft.id = mi.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    ft.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS role_order,
    c.note AS role_note,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    co.name AS company_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND c.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role LIKE '%lead%')
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH movie_roles AS (
    SELECT c.person_id, c.movie_id, c.nr_order, c.note AS role_note
    FROM cast_info c
    JOIN role_type rt ON c.role_id = rt.id
    WHERE rt.role LIKE '%lead%'
),
movie_details AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    md.title AS movie_title,
    mr.nr_order AS role_order,
    mr.role_note AS role_note,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    co.name AS company_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    movie_roles mr ON a.person_id = mr.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_details md ON mr.movie_id = md.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON md.movie_id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON md.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON md.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
ORDER BY 
    a.name, md.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.role_id AS role_id,
    c.nr_order AS role_order,
    co.name AS company_name,
    co.country_code AS company_country,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    cast_info c
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
AND 
    k.keyword ILIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY 
    a.name, t.production_year DESC, co.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword ILIKE '%action%'
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, co.name, co.country_code
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
),
title_info AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ti.info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    c.role_id AS role_id,
    c.nr_order AS role_order,
    tc.name AS company_name,
    tc.country_code AS company_country,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    tinfo.info AS movie_info
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    cast_info c ON c.movie_id = ft.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    title_companies tc ON tc.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN
    action_keywords ak ON ak.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN
    title_info tinfo ON tinfo.movie_id = ft.id
ORDER BY
    a.name, ft.production_year DESC, tc.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    p.info AS person_info,
    co.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    r.role AS role_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id AND p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
    AND co.country_code = 'USA'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    c.nr_order ASC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
WITH movie_filter AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
usa_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, co.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    WHERE co.country_code = 'USA'
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    mf.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    p.info AS person_info,
    uc.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    r.role AS role_type
FROM 
    movie_filter mf
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON mf.id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON it.info = 'Biography'
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id AND p.info_type_id = it.id
JOIN 
    usa_companies uc ON mf.id = uc.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON mf.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
ORDER BY 
    mf.production_year DESC, 
    c.nr_order ASC
LIMIT 50

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    mi.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023 
    AND ct.kind = 'Distributor'
    AND mi.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Box Office')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH box_office_info AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type it ON mi.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE it.info = 'Box Office'
),
distributor_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE ct.kind = 'Distributor'
)
SELECT
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    dc.kind AS company_type,
    boi.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    title t
JOIN
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    distributor_companies dc ON t.id = dc.movie_id
JOIN
    box_office_info boi ON t.id = boi.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC,
    a.name

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT w.id) AS total_keywords,
    AVG(m.info_type_id) AS average_info_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword w ON t.id = w.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY 
    a.name, t.title, t.production_year, ct.kind
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT w.id) > 10
ORDER BY 
    total_keywords DESC, t.production_year ASC;
sql2:
WITH keyword_counts AS (
    SELECT movie_id, COUNT(*) AS total_keywords
    FROM movie_keyword
    GROUP BY movie_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
),
info_avg AS (
    SELECT movie_id, AVG(info_type_id) AS average_info_type
    FROM movie_info
    GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    COALESCE(kc.total_keywords, 0) AS total_keywords,
    ia.average_info_type
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN
    keyword_counts kc ON t.id = kc.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    info_avg ia ON t.id = ia.movie_id
WHERE
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY
    a.name, t.title, t.production_year, ct.kind, kc.total_keywords, ia.average_info_type
ORDER BY
    total_keywords DESC, t.production_year ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.nr_order AS cast_order, 
    r.role AS role_type 
FROM 
    aka_name a 
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id 
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id 
WHERE 
    r.role = 'Lead' 
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2000 
    AND co.country_code = 'USA' 
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC 
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2000
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM movie_companies mc
          JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
          WHERE mc.movie_id = title.id
            AND co.country_code = 'USA'
      )
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    'Lead' AS role_type
FROM
    cast_info c
JOIN filtered_titles ft ON c.movie_id = ft.id
JOIN aka_name a ON a.person_id = c.person_id
WHERE
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM role_type r
        WHERE r.id = c.role_id
          AND r.role = 'Lead'
    )
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    a.name ASC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT t.title, a.name AS actor_name, c.kind AS cast_type, m.info AS movie_info, k.keyword
FROM title t
JOIN cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
  AND a.name LIKE '%Smith%'
  AND k.keyword IN ('Action', 'Drama', 'Thriller')
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
filtered_actors AS (
    SELECT person_id, name
    FROM aka_name
    WHERE name LIKE '%Smith%'
),
filtered_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword IN ('Action', 'Drama', 'Thriller')
)
SELECT ft.title, fa.name AS actor_name, c.kind AS cast_type, m.info AS movie_info, fk.keyword
FROM filtered_titles ft
JOIN cast_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN filtered_actors fa ON ci.person_id = fa.person_id
JOIN comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN movie_info m ON ft.id = m.movie_id
JOIN filtered_keywords fk ON ft.id = fk.movie_id
ORDER BY ft.production_year DESC, fa.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    c.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    i.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND c.country_code = 'USA'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC,
    a.name ASC,
    k.keyword ASC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
),
movie_cast AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, mb.title, mb.production_year,
           a.name AS actor_name, r.role AS actor_role
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON mb.movie_id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
    JOIN role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, c.name AS company_name
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mb.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
    WHERE c.country_code = 'USA'
)
SELECT 
    mc2.title AS movie_title,
    mc2.actor_name,
    mc2.actor_role,
    mco.company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    i.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    movie_cast mc2
JOIN 
    movie_comp mco ON mc2.movie_id = mco.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON mc2.movie_id = mk.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON mc2.movie_id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
ORDER BY 
    mc2.production_year DESC,
    mc2.actor_name ASC,
    k.keyword ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH movie_data AS (
    SELECT t.id AS aka_title_id, t.movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM aka_title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT md.aka_title_id, md.movie_id, md.title, md.production_year, k.keyword
    FROM movie_data md
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON md.aka_title_id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mkw.aka_title_id, mkw.movie_id, mkw.title, mkw.production_year, mkw.keyword,
           c.kind
    FROM movie_kw mkw
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mkw.aka_title_id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    mco.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    mco.kind AS company_type,
    mco.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    movie_comp mco
JOIN cast_info ci ON mco.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
ORDER BY
    mco.production_year DESC;

SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    p.info AS person_info,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON ci.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
cast_persons AS (
    SELECT ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_role_id, ci.role_id
    FROM cast_info ci
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM role_type r WHERE r.id = ci.role_id)
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    p.info AS person_info,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN 
    cast_persons cp ON ft.movie_id = cp.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = cp.person_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON cp.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON cp.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
ORDER BY 
    ft.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    c.kind AS company_kind,
    p.info AS person_info,
    r.role AS role_type
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id AND cc.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
AND 
    k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
action_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%action%'
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    ft.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ak.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    co.company_kind,
    p.info AS person_info,
    r.role AS role_type
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    action_keywords ak ON ft.id = ak.movie_id
JOIN
    complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id AND cc.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    company_info co ON ft.id = co.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC, a.name;

SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    c.name AS company_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
LEFT JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
AND 
    r.role = 'Actor'
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
actor_role AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM role_type
    WHERE role = 'Actor'
),
cast_actors AS (
    SELECT ci.movie_id, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN actor_role r ON ci.role_id = r.id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.name AS company_name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
),
kw_info AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    ca.actor_name AS actor_name,
    'Actor' AS actor_role,
    co.company_name AS company_name,
    kw.movie_keyword AS movie_keyword,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    cast_actors ca ON ft.id = ca.movie_id
JOIN
    company_info co ON ft.id = co.movie_id
JOIN
    kw_info kw ON ft.id = kw.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    movie_info m ON ft.id = m.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC,
    ca.actor_name ASC;

JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id

WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, mb.title, mb.production_year,
           ckt.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mb.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type ckt ON mc.company_type_id = ckt.id
),
movie_cast AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, a.name AS actor_name, ci.note AS role_note
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
movie_inf AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ti.info AS movie_info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
)
SELECT
    mc2.title,
    mca.actor_name,
    mca.role_note,
    mc2.company_type,
    mi2.movie_info
FROM
    movie_comp mc2
JOIN
    movie_cast mca ON mc2.movie_id = mca.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_inf mi2 ON mc2.movie_id = mi2.movie_id
ORDER BY
    mc2.production_year DESC,
    mca.actor_name;

WITH filtered_titles AS (

    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_cast AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, ft.production_year, ci.person_id
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
),
title_cast_person AS (
    SELECT tc.movie_id, tc.title, tc.production_year, a.name AS actor_name, a.person_id
    FROM title_cast tc
    JOIN aka_name a ON tc.person_id = a.person_id
),
title_cast_person_info AS (
    SELECT tcp.movie_id, tcp.title, tcp.production_year, tcp.actor_name, p.info AS person_info
    FROM title_cast_person tcp
    JOIN person_info p ON tcp.person_id = p.person_id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, k.keyword

    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id

),
title_cast AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, ft.production_year, ci.person_id
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
),
title_cast_person AS (
    SELECT tc.movie_id, tc.title, tc.production_year, a.name AS actor_name, a.person_id
    FROM title_cast tc
    JOIN aka_name a ON tc.person_id = a.person_id
),
title_cast_person_info AS (
    SELECT tcp.movie_id, tcp.title, tcp.production_year, tcp.actor_name, p.info AS person_info
    FROM title_cast_person tcp
    JOIN person_info p ON tcp.person_id = p.person_id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, c.name AS company_name
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    tcpi.title AS movie_title,
    tcpi.actor_name AS actor_name,
    tcpi.person_info AS person_info,
    tk.movie_keyword AS movie_keyword,
    tco.company_name AS company_name
FROM
    title_cast_person_info tcpi
JOIN
    title_keywords tk ON tcpi.movie_id = tk.movie_id
JOIN
    title_companies tco ON tcpi.movie_id = tco.movie_id
ORDER BY
    tcpi.production_year DESC,
    tcpi.actor_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    n.name AS person_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    comp.name AS company_name,
    mt.kind AS company_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    name n ON a.person_id = n.imdb_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name comp ON mc.company_id = comp.id
JOIN 
    company_type mt ON mc.company_type_id = mt.id
WHERE 
    c.nr_order < 3
  AND 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH person_cast AS (
    SELECT a.name AS aka_name, a.person_id, c.movie_id, c.note AS cast_note
    FROM aka_name a
    JOIN cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
    WHERE c.nr_order < 3
),
movie_info AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.movie_id, t.title AS movie_title, t.production_year
    FROM aka_title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, comp.name AS company_name, mt.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name comp ON mc.company_id = comp.id
    JOIN company_type mt ON mc.company_type_id = mt.id
)
SELECT
    pc.aka_name,
    mi.movie_title,
    pc.cast_note,
    n.name AS person_name,
    mkw.movie_keyword,
    mco.company_name,
    mco.company_type
FROM
    person_cast pc
JOIN
    movie_info mi ON pc.movie_id = mi.movie_id
JOIN
    name n ON pc.person_id = n.imdb_id
JOIN
    movie_kw mkw ON mi.id = mkw.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_comp mco ON mi.id = mco.movie_id
ORDER BY
    mi.production_year DESC, pc.aka_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    r.role AS role_type,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
JOIN 
    aka_name p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    t.title, 
    c.nr_order;
sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_info mi WHERE mi.movie_id = t.id)
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_keyword mk JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id WHERE mk.movie_id = t.id)
),
cast_details AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, c.person_id, c.role_id, c.note, c.nr_order
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    WHERE cc.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movie_base)
)
SELECT
    mb.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    r.role AS role_type,
    cd.note AS cast_note,
    cd.nr_order AS cast_order
FROM
    movie_base mb
JOIN
    cast_details cd ON mb.id = cd.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name p ON cd.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    role_type r ON cd.role_id = r.id
ORDER BY
    mb.production_year DESC,
    mb.title,
    cd.nr_order;

SELECT 
    a.id AS aka_name_id,
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.id AS title_id,

    p.id AS person_id,

FROM

JOIN

WHERE

ORDER BY 
    t.title, c.nr_order;
sql2:

    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year = 2022
),
cast_in_2022 AS (
    SELECT c.id AS cast_info_id, c.person_id, c.nr_order, m.id AS title_id, m.title AS movie_title
    FROM cast_info c
    INNER JOIN movies_2022 m ON c.movie_id = m.id
)

INNER JOIN
    name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
ORDER BY
    ci.movie_title, ci.nr_order;

FROM

JOIN

JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id

    name n ON ak.person_id = n.imdb_id

    t.production_year >= 2000

sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (

    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, mb.title, mb.production_year, ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mb.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
),
movie_kw AS (

    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id

SELECT 
    pa.name AS aka_name,
    mc2.title AS movie_title,

    (SELECT n2.name FROM name n2 WHERE n2.imdb_id = pa.person_id) AS person_name,
    mc2.company_type AS company_type,
    mi.info AS movie_info,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    person_aka pa
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON pa.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_comp mc2 ON ci.movie_id = mc2.movie_id

    movie_info mi ON mc2.movie_id = mi.movie_id

ORDER BY

sql2:
WITH recent_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT rt.id AS movie_id, rt.title, rt.production_year, m.name AS company_name
    FROM recent_titles rt
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON rt.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT rt.id AS movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM recent_titles rt
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON rt.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
title_cast AS (

    JOIN cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
    JOIN aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM recent_titles rt WHERE rt.id = cc.movie_id)

    tca.actor_name,
    tca.role_note,
    tc.company_name,
    tk.keyword
FROM

JOIN

JOIN
    title_keywords tk ON tc.movie_id = tk.movie_id
ORDER BY
    tc.production_year DESC, tc.title;

SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    r.role AS role_name,
    c.kind AS comp_cast_type
FROM 
    cast_info ci
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id

    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    title m ON t.movie_id = m.id
WHERE 
    m.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    m.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;

WITH filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cn.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    mc.name AS company_name,
    fm.production_year,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    filtered_movies fm
JOIN
    aka_title t ON t.movie_id = fm.id
JOIN
    cast_info c ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN
    movie_comp mc ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    movie_kw mkw ON mkw.movie_id = t.id
ORDER BY
    fm.production_year DESC,
    a.name;

JOIN 
    aka_name ak ON ak.person_id = ak_t.id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = t.id AND ci.person_id = ak.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
title_aka AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, ft.production_year, ak.person_id AS aka_person_id, ak.name AS actor_name
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN aka_title ak_t ON ak_t.movie_id = ft.id
    JOIN aka_name ak ON ak.person_id = ak_t.id
),
title_cast AS (
    SELECT ta.movie_id, ta.title, ta.production_year, ta.actor_name
    FROM title_aka ta
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM cast_info ci
        WHERE ci.movie_id = ta.movie_id AND ci.person_id = ta.aka_person_id
    )
)
SELECT 
    tc.title AS movie_title,
    tc.actor_name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title_cast tc
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = tc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON m.movie_id = tc.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    tc.production_year DESC, tc.actor_name;

WITH person_bio AS (

    FROM person_info p
    JOIN info_type it ON p.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE it.info = 'Biography'
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, ki.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword ki ON mk.keyword_id = ki.id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cn.name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
)
SELECT

    mco.name AS company_name,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pb.info AS person_info
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    person_bio pb ON a.person_id = pb.person_id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_comp mco ON t.id = mco.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_kw mkw ON t.id = mkw.movie_id
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;

WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
movie_actors AS (
    SELECT mb.id, mb.title, mb.production_year, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON mb.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc

JOIN

JOIN
    movie_info m ON ma.id = m.movie_id

    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000

    cast_info AS c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title AS t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type AS r ON c.role_id = r.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH recent_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
cast_roles AS (
    SELECT c.person_id, c.movie_id, c.note, r.role
    FROM cast_info AS c
    JOIN role_type AS r ON c.role_id = r.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rt.title AS movie_title,
    rt.production_year,
    cr.role AS role_type,
    cr.note AS cast_note
FROM
    aka_name AS a
JOIN
    cast_roles AS cr ON a.person_id = cr.person_id
JOIN
    recent_titles AS rt ON cr.movie_id = rt.id
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC, a.name;

movie_keywords_cte AS (

),
cast_info_cte AS (

    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000

movie_cast AS (

           c.person_id, c.role_id
