    JOIN cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, co.name AS company_name
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mb.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
),
movie_inf AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, ti.info AS movie_info
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mb.movie_id = mi.movie_id
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, kw.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mb.movie_id = mk.movie_id

SELECT

JOIN movie_comp mco ON mc2.movie_id = mco.movie_id

JOIN movie_kw mkw ON mc2.movie_id = mkw.movie_id

    mc2.production_year DESC, a.name;

           mc.company_id,
           mc.company_type_id

    WHERE at2.production_year >= 2000
),
film_info AS (
    SELECT at1.movie_id,
           at1.id AS at_id,
           at1.title AS movie_title,

           cn.name AS company_name
    FROM aka_title at1
    INNER JOIN movie_comp mc ON at1.id = mc.movie_id

    fi.company_name

INNER JOIN

INNER JOIN 
    aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
ORDER BY 
    fi.production_year DESC, an.name;

WITH filtered_titles AS (

    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
title_with_companies AS (
    SELECT ft.id, ft.title, ft.production_year
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM movie_companies mc
        JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
        WHERE mc.movie_id = ft.id
    )
),
cast_subjects AS (
    SELECT tc.title AS movie_title, tc.production_year, c.person_id, c.role_id, c.note AS cast_note

JOIN

    role_type r ON cs.role_id = r.id
ORDER BY 
    cs.production_year DESC,

    aka_name ak ON mca.person_id = ak.person_id

JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mb.movie_id = mk.movie_id

    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id

    ak.name, at.title, ct.kind

WITH movie_company_info AS (
    SELECT
        at.movie_id,
        at.title,
        ct.kind
    FROM
        aka_title at
    JOIN
        movie_companies mc ON at.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
),
person_movies AS (
    SELECT
        ci.person_id,

ORDER BY

),
actor_info AS (

    title t
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, ft.production_year, mc.note AS company_note, mc.company_id
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
),
title_info AS (
    SELECT tc.movie_id, tc.title, tc.production_year, tc.company_note
    FROM title_companies tc
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM company_name cn WHERE cn.id = tc.company_id)
),
cast_actors AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, ci.person_id, ci.person_role_id

    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
)
SELECT

    movie_info mi ON ti.movie_id = mi.movie_id
JOIN

JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ca.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN

ORDER BY 
    ti.production_year DESC;

WITH recent_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
cast_roles AS (
    SELECT c.person_id, c.movie_id, c.role_id, r.role AS person_role
    FROM cast_info c
    JOIN role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rt.title AS movie_title,
    rt.production_year,
    cr.role_id,
    cr.person_role
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_roles cr ON a.person_id = cr.person_id
JOIN
    recent_titles rt ON cr.movie_id = rt.id
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    c.kind AS cast_type, 
    m.info AS movie_description
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
WHERE 
    m.info_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'description')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    c.kind AS cast_type, 
    m.info AS movie_description
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type it ON m.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'description'
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS actor_role,
    m.name AS company_name,
    g.kind AS genre,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    person_info pi ON a.person_id = pi.person_id
JOIN 
    kind_type g ON t.kind_id = g.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, kind_id, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, ft.kind_id, ft.production_year,
           m.name AS company_name
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name m ON mc.company_id = m.id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
cast_people AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, a.person_id, a.name AS actor_name, r.role AS actor_role
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
    JOIN role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_titles ft WHERE ft.id = cc.movie_id)
)
SELECT
    tc.title,
    cp.actor_name,
    cp.actor_role,
    tc.company_name,
    g.kind AS genre,
    tk.movie_keyword,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM
    title_companies tc
JOIN
    title_keywords tk ON tc.movie_id = tk.movie_id
JOIN
    cast_people cp ON tc.movie_id = cp.movie_id
JOIN
    person_info pi ON cp.person_id = pi.person_id
JOIN
    kind_type g ON tc.kind_id = g.id
ORDER BY
    tc.production_year DESC,
    cp.actor_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS comp_cast_type,
    m.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.role_id = c.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_cast AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, ft.production_year,
           ci.person_id, ci.role_id
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
),
title_info AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, m.info
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_info m ON ft.id = m.movie_id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    tc.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS comp_cast_type,
    ti.info AS movie_info,
    tk.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    title_cast tc
JOIN aka_name a ON tc.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN comp_cast_type c ON tc.role_id = c.id
JOIN title_info ti ON tc.movie_id = ti.movie_id
JOIN title_keywords tk ON tc.movie_id = tk.movie_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    WHERE mc.movie_id = tc.movie_id
)
ORDER BY
    tc.production_year DESC;

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_info AS (
    SELECT ft.id, ft.title, ft.production_year, m.info AS movie_info
    FROM filtered_titles ft, movie_info m
    WHERE ft.id = m.movie_id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk, keyword k
    WHERE mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
cast_actors AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, a.name AS actor_name, c.kind AS cast_kind
    FROM complete_cast cc, cast_info ci, aka_name a, comp_cast_type c
    WHERE cc.subject_id = ci.id
      AND ci.person_id = a.person_id
      AND ci.person_role_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    ti.title AS movie_title,
    ca.actor_name,
    ca.cast_kind,
    ti.movie_info,
    tk.movie_keyword
FROM
    title_info ti,
    title_keywords tk,
    cast_actors ca
WHERE
    ti.id = tk.movie_id
    AND ti.id = ca.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ti.production_year DESC,
    ti.title,
    ca.actor_name;

FROM

JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN

JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN

sql2:
WITH movie_data AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM aka_title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT md.movie_id, md.title, md.production_year, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_data md
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON md.movie_id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mkw.movie_id, mkw.title, mkw.production_year, mkw.movie_keyword, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_kw mkw
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mkw.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    mc.title AS movie_title,
    mc.production_year,
    mc.company_type,
    mc.movie_keyword
FROM
    movie_comp mc
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON mc.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
ORDER BY
    mc.production_year DESC,
    a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    r.role AS role_name,
    c.name AS company_name,
    i.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info i ON t.id = i.movie_id
WHERE 
    i.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Plot')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC;

    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000

SELECT

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.name AS actor_name,
    p.info AS person_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name c ON ci.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year = 2020
ORDER BY 
    t.title, c.name;
sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year = 2020
),
actor_info AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, c.name AS actor_name, c.person_id
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    JOIN aka_name c ON ci.person_id = c.person_id
),
keyword_info AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cn.name AS company_name
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
)
SELECT
    mb.title AS movie_title,
    ai.actor_name AS actor_name,
    p.info AS person_info,
    ki.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ci2.company_name AS company_name,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM
    movie_base mb
JOIN actor_info ai ON mb.movie_id = ai.movie_id
JOIN person_info p ON ai.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN keyword_info ki ON mb.movie_id = ki.movie_id
JOIN company_info ci2 ON mb.movie_id = ci2.movie_id
JOIN movie_info m ON mb.movie_id = m.movie_id
ORDER BY
    mb.title, ai.actor_name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    ak.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ci.nr_order,
    ci.note AS cast_note,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    mt.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name ak
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON ak.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type mt ON mc.company_type_id = mt.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, ak.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS title_id, ft.movie_id, ft.title, ft.production_year,
           cn.name AS company_name, mt.kind AS company_type
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type mt ON mc.company_type_id = mt.id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS title_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    ak.name AS aka_name,
    tc.title AS movie_title,
    ci.nr_order,
    ci.note AS cast_note,
    tc.company_name,
    tc.company_type,
    tk.movie_keyword
FROM
    title_companies tc
JOIN
    title_keywords tk ON tc.title_id = tk.title_id
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON tc.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name ak ON ci.person_id = ak.person_id
ORDER BY
    tc.production_year DESC, ak.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.nr_order AS cast_order, 
    r.role AS role_type, 
    m.info AS movie_info 
FROM 
    aka_name a 
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id 
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id 
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id 
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id 
WHERE 
    m.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'summary')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, c.nr_order ASC;
sql2:
WITH summary_info AS (
    SELECT m.movie_id, m.info
    FROM movie_info m
    JOIN info_type it ON m.info_type_id = it.id
    WHERE it.info = 'summary'
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    r.role AS role_type,
    si.info AS movie_info
FROM
    cast_info c
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    summary_info si ON t.id = si.movie_id
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC, c.nr_order ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.person_role_id,
    p.name AS person_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ci.kind AS company_type,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ci ON mc.company_type_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year, a.name;
sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, mb.title, mb.production_year, k.keyword
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mb.movie_id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_co AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, ci.kind
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mb.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_type ci ON mc.company_type_id = ci.id
),
movie_inf AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, mi.info
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mb.movie_id = mi.movie_id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    mkw.title AS movie_title,
    c.person_role_id,
    p.name AS person_name,
    mkw.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    mco.kind AS company_type,
    minf.info AS movie_info
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
JOIN
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN
    movie_kw mkw ON c.movie_id = mkw.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_co mco ON mkw.movie_id = mco.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_inf minf ON mkw.movie_id = minf.movie_id
ORDER BY
    mkw.production_year, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    kt.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword kt ON mk.keyword_id = kt.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography')
    AND t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    cn.name AS company_name,
    kt.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM
    info_type it
JOIN
    person_info p ON p.info_type_id = it.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN
    cast_info c ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    aka_title t ON t.movie_id = c.movie_id AND t.production_year > 2000
JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
JOIN
    movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = t.id
JOIN
    keyword kt ON kt.id = mk.keyword_id
WHERE
    it.info = 'Biography'
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ci.role_id AS actor_role,
    ckt.kind AS cast_type,
    c.name AS company_name,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_title t
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type ckt ON ci.person_role_id = ckt.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_cast AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, ft.production_year,
           ci.person_id, ci.person_role_id, ci.role_id
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN cast_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
),
title_cast_actor AS (
    SELECT tc.movie_id, tc.title, tc.production_year,
           tc.person_role_id, tc.role_id,
           a.name AS actor_name
    FROM title_cast tc
    JOIN aka_name a ON tc.person_id = a.person_id
)
SELECT 
    tca.title AS movie_title,
    tca.actor_name AS actor_name,
    tca.role_id AS actor_role,
    ckt.kind AS cast_type,
    c.name AS company_name,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title_cast_actor tca
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type ckt ON tca.person_role_id = ckt.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON tca.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON tca.movie_id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
ORDER BY 
    tca.production_year DESC, 
    tca.actor_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    ak.name AS aka_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    p.name AS person_name, 
    r.role AS role_name, 
    c.kind AS company_type,
    m.info AS movie_info, 
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name ak
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON ak.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON t.id = m.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    name p ON ak.person_id = p.imdb_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
ORDER BY 
    ak.name, t.title;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2020
),
title_info AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, m.info
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_info m ON ft.id = m.movie_id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
),
person_cast AS (
    SELECT ak.name AS aka_name, ak.person_id, ci.movie_id, ci.role_id
    FROM aka_name ak
    JOIN cast_info ci ON ak.person_id = ci.person_id
)
SELECT
    pc.aka_name AS aka_name,
    ti.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    r.role AS role_name,
    tc.kind AS company_type,
    ti.info AS movie_info,
    tk.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    person_cast pc
JOIN title_info ti ON pc.movie_id = ti.movie_id
JOIN role_type r ON pc.role_id = r.id
JOIN title_companies tc ON ti.movie_id = tc.movie_id
JOIN title_keywords tk ON ti.movie_id = tk.movie_id
JOIN name p ON pc.person_id = p.imdb_id
ORDER BY
    pc.aka_name, ti.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    n.name AS actor_name,
    co.name AS company_name,
    mt.kind AS company_type,
    ti.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    name n ON a.person_id = n.imdb_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    company_type mt ON mc.company_type_id = mt.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    a.name, 
    co.name;
sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year > 2000
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mb.movie_id, mb.title, mb.production_year,
           co.name AS company_name, mt.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_base mb
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON mb.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
    JOIN company_type mt ON mc.company_type_id = mt.id
),
movie_info_cte AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ti.info AS movie_info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
),
movie_kw_cte AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
person_cte AS (
    SELECT a.name AS aka_name, a.person_id, n.imdb_id
    FROM aka_name a
    JOIN name n ON a.person_id = n.imdb_id
)
SELECT 
    p.aka_name,
    mc.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    n.name AS actor_name,
    mc.company_name,
    mc.company_type,
    mi.movie_info,
    mk.movie_keyword
FROM 
    person_cte p
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON p.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_comp mc ON c.movie_id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    name n ON p.imdb_id = n.imdb_id
JOIN 
    movie_info_cte mi ON mc.movie_id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_kw_cte mk ON mc.movie_id = mk.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    mc.production_year DESC, 
    p.aka_name, 
    mc.company_name;

JOIN

JOIN

sql2:
WITH movie_data AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT md.movie_id, md.title, md.production_year, k.keyword
    FROM movie_data md
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON md.movie_id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mk2.movie_id, mk2.title, mk2.production_year, mk2.keyword, c.kind
    FROM movie_kw mk2
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mk2.movie_id = mi.movie_id
    JOIN company_name cn ON mi.movie_id = cn.imdb_id
    JOIN company_type c ON cn.id = c.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    mc.title AS movie_title,
    p.info AS person_info,
    mc.kind AS company_type,
    mc.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    movie_comp mc
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON mc.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY
    mc.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
actor_movies AS (
    SELECT a.name AS actor_name, ci.movie_id
    FROM aka_name a
    JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    c.nr_order AS cast_order,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name AS a
JOIN 
    cast_info AS c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title AS t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies AS mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type AS ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    movie_info AS mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    name AS p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, c.nr_order;
sql2:
WITH person_cast AS (
    SELECT a.person_id, a.name AS aka_name, c.movie_id, c.nr_order
    FROM aka_name AS a
    JOIN cast_info AS c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
),
recent_movies AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies AS mc
    JOIN company_type AS ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT 
    pc.aka_name,
    rm.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    pc.nr_order AS cast_order,
    mco.company_type,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    recent_movies AS rm
JOIN 
    person_cast AS pc ON rm.id = pc.movie_id
JOIN 
    name AS p ON pc.person_id = p.imdb_id
JOIN 
    movie_comp AS mco ON rm.id = mco.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_info AS mi ON rm.id = mi.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    rm.production_year DESC, pc.nr_order;

sql2:

title_companies AS (

sql1:
SELECT t.title, a.name, p.info
FROM title AS t
JOIN movie_companies AS mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN company_name AS c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN cast_info AS ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN aka_name AS a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN person_info AS p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
  AND c.country_code = 'USA'
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, t.title;
sql2:
WITH usa_movies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id
    FROM movie_companies AS mc
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM company_name AS c
        WHERE c.id = mc.company_id
          AND c.country_code = 'USA'
    )
),
person_aka AS (
    SELECT a.person_id, a.name, p.info
    FROM aka_name AS a
    JOIN person_info AS p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
)
SELECT t.title, pa.name, pa.info
FROM title AS t
JOIN usa_movies AS um ON t.id = um.movie_id
JOIN cast_info AS ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN person_aka AS pa ON ci.person_id = pa.person_id
WHERE t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, t.title;

    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN cast_info c ON ft.id = c.movie_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, co.name AS company_name
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
title_info AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ti.info AS movie_info
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_info mi ON ft.id = mi.movie_id
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
)
SELECT
    tc.title AS movie_title,
    tc.actor_name,
    tc.role_id AS role,
    tco.company_name,
    tk.movie_keyword,
    tinfo.movie_info
FROM
    title_cast tc
JOIN title_companies tco ON tc.movie_id = tco.movie_id
JOIN title_keywords tk ON tc.movie_id = tk.movie_id
JOIN title_info tinfo ON tc.movie_id = tinfo.movie_id
ORDER BY
    tc.title, tc.actor_name;

actor_roles AS (

sql1:
SELECT 
    m.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS role_name,
    c.note AS cast_note,
    co.name AS company_name,
    ti.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title m
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON m.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON m.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON m.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
WHERE 
    m.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    m.production_year, m.title;
sql2:
WITH filtered_movies AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
movie_company_info AS (
    SELECT fm.id AS movie_id, fm.title, fm.production_year, co.name AS company_name
    FROM filtered_movies fm
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON fm.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name co ON mc.company_id = co.id
),
movie_cast AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, c.id AS cast_id, c.person_id, c.role_id, c.note AS cast_note
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info c ON cc.subject_id = c.id
),
movie_info_data AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, ti.info AS movie_info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type ti ON mi.info_type_id = ti.id
)
SELECT
    mci.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role AS role_name,
    mcst.cast_note,
    mci.company_name,
    mid.movie_info
FROM
    movie_company_info mci
JOIN
    movie_cast mcst ON mci.movie_id = mcst.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON mcst.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    role_type r ON mcst.role_id = r.id
JOIN
    movie_info_data mid ON mci.movie_id = mid.movie_id
ORDER BY
    mci.production_year, mci.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ct.kind AS company_type,
    ci.note AS cast_note,
    mi.info AS movie_info,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;
sql2:
WITH movie_info_cte AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info
    FROM movie_info mi
),
movie_kw_cte AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
cast_cte AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, ci.person_id, ci.note
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
),
company_cte AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
)
SELECT
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    co.kind AS company_type,
    ca.note AS cast_note,
    mi.info AS movie_info,
    mk.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM
    title t
JOIN movie_info_cte mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN movie_kw_cte mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN cast_cte ca ON t.id = ca.movie_id
JOIN aka_name a ON ca.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN company_cte co ON t.id = co.movie_id
ORDER BY
    t.title, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    i.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
JOIN 
    name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cn.id AS cn_id, c.kind
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
movie_inf AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, i.info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    p.name AS person_name,
    mc.kind AS company_type,
    mk.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    mi.info AS movie_info
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    name p ON a.person_id = p.imdb_id
JOIN
    movie_comp mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_kw mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_inf mi ON ft.id = mi.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    p.info AS person_info,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    ci.note AS company_note,
    mt.note AS movie_info_note
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON ci.movie_id = cn.imdb_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON ci.movie_id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_info mt ON ci.movie_id = mt.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
  AND 
    p.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Bio')
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;
sql2:
WITH bio_type AS (
    SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Bio'
),
person_bio AS (
    SELECT p.person_id, p.info
    FROM person_info p
    INNER JOIN bio_type bt ON p.info_type_id = bt.id
),
cast_movies AS (
    SELECT ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_role_id, ci.note
    FROM cast_info ci
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM aka_title t
        WHERE t.movie_id = ci.movie_id
          AND t.production_year >= 2000
    )
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    pb.info AS person_info,
    c.kind AS cast_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    cm.note AS company_note,
    mt.note AS movie_info_note
FROM
    aka_name a
INNER JOIN person_bio pb ON a.person_id = pb.person_id
INNER JOIN cast_movies cm ON a.person_id = cm.person_id
INNER JOIN aka_title t ON cm.movie_id = t.movie_id
    AND t.production_year >= 2000
INNER JOIN company_name cn ON cm.movie_id = cn.imdb_id
INNER JOIN comp_cast_type c ON cm.person_role_id = c.id
INNER JOIN movie_keyword mk ON cm.movie_id = mk.movie_id
INNER JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
INNER JOIN movie_info mt ON cm.movie_id = mt.movie_id
ORDER BY
    t.production_year DESC, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info,
    ct.kind AS company_type
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN 
    company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
    AND ct.kind = 'Production'
GROUP BY 
    t.title, a.name, k.keyword, p.info, ct.kind
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;
sql2:
WITH movie_comp AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, ct.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
    WHERE ct.kind = 'Production'
),
movie_actors AS (
    SELECT ci.movie_id, a.person_id, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
movie_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    t.title AS movie_title,
    ma.actor_name AS actor_name,
    mkw.movie_keyword AS movie_keyword,
    p.info AS person_info,
    mc.company_type AS company_type
FROM
    title t
JOIN movie_comp mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN movie_actors ma ON t.id = ma.movie_id
JOIN movie_kw mkw ON t.id = mkw.movie_id
JOIN person_info p ON ma.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE
    t.production_year >= 2000
GROUP BY
    t.title, ma.actor_name, mkw.movie_keyword, p.info, mc.company_type
ORDER BY
    t.title, ma.actor_name;

    c.note AS role_note,
    n.name AS person_name,

FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    name n ON a.person_id = n.imdb_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE

sql2:

    FROM title
    WHERE production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023
),
person_cast AS (

    WHERE EXISTS (

    )
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    pc.note AS role_note,
    n.name AS person_name,
    p.info AS person_info
FROM

JOIN

JOIN

JOIN

ORDER BY

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword,
    i.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    aka_title at ON t.id = at.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON at.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN 
    movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
JOIN 
    info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year = 2020
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;
sql2:
WITH movie_base AS (
    SELECT t.id AS movie_id, t.title
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year = 2020
),
actor_info AS (
    SELECT ci.movie_id, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM cast_info ci
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
),
keyword_info AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
info_data AS (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, i.info AS movie_info
    FROM movie_info mi
    JOIN info_type i ON mi.info_type_id = i.id
)
SELECT
    mb.title,
    ai.actor_name,
    ci.company_type,
    ki.movie_keyword,
    id.movie_info
FROM
    movie_base mb
JOIN
    aka_title at ON mb.movie_id = at.movie_id
JOIN
    actor_info ai ON at.id = ai.movie_id
JOIN
    company_info ci ON mb.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    keyword_info ki ON mb.movie_id = ki.movie_id
JOIN
    info_data id ON mb.movie_id = id.movie_id
ORDER BY
    mb.title, ai.actor_name;

JOIN

JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_cast AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, ft.production_year,
           a.name AS actor_name, ci.nr_order
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
title_company AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
),
title_kw AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    tc.title,
    tc.actor_name,
    tc.nr_order,
    tco.company_type,
    tk.movie_keyword
FROM title_cast tc
JOIN title_company tco ON tc.movie_id = tco.movie_id
JOIN title_kw tk ON tc.movie_id = tk.movie_id
ORDER BY tc.production_year DESC, tc.actor_name;

SELECT

    base.company_type

        t.production_year,
        a.name AS actor_name, 
        c.kind AS company_type
    FROM 
        title t
    JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN 
        aka_name a ON cc.subject_id = a.person_id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year > 2000
) base
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = (
        SELECT t2.id FROM title t2 WHERE t2.title = base.title AND t2.production_year = base.production_year LIMIT 1

ORDER BY 
    base.production_year DESC;

    aka_name AS a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    comp_cast_type AS c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_info AS m ON t.id = m.movie_id
WHERE 
    m.info_type_id = 1
ORDER BY 
    t.title;

    WHERE info_type_id = 1

    mif.info AS movie_info
FROM
    aka_title AS t
JOIN
    movie_info_filtered AS mif ON t.id = mif.movie_id
JOIN
    cast_info AS ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name AS a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    comp_cast_type AS c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id
ORDER BY
    t.title;

    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year = 2020
),

    SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.title
    FROM movies_2020 m
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM movie_companies mc
        JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
        WHERE mc.movie_id = m.id
    )
)
SELECT
    mwc.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS cast_type
FROM
    movie_with_companies mwc
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON mwc.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id

    comp_cast_type c ON ci.person_role_id = c.id

SELECT 
    ft.title, 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    p.info AS actor_info
FROM 
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON ft.id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON ft.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY 
    ft.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    t.production_year, 
    r.role AS role_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH recent_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
cast_roles AS (
    SELECT c.person_id, c.movie_id, r.role
    FROM cast_info c
    JOIN role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    rt.title AS movie_title,
    rt.production_year,
    cr.role AS role_type
FROM
    recent_titles rt
JOIN
    cast_roles cr ON cr.movie_id = rt.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON a.person_id = cr.person_id
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.note AS role_note
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON t.id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year = 2020
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;
sql2:
WITH movies_2020 AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year = 2020
)
SELECT 
    m.title AS movie_title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.note AS role_note
FROM 
    movies_2020 m
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON m.id = c.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
ORDER BY 
    m.title, a.name;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    c.kind AS company_type,
    k.keyword AS movie_keyword
FROM 
    aka_title t
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN 
    keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_actors AS (
    SELECT ft.id, ft.title, ft.production_year, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN cast_info ci ON ft.id = ci.movie_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT mk.movie_id, k.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM movie_keyword mk
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
)
SELECT
    ta.title,
    ta.actor_name,
    tc.company_type,
    tk.movie_keyword
FROM
    title_actors ta
JOIN
    title_companies tc ON ta.id = tc.movie_id
JOIN
    title_keywords tk ON ta.id = tk.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ta.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    r.role AS role
FROM 
    cast_info c
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON c.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT movie_id, title, production_year
    FROM aka_title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    ft.title AS movie_title,
    ft.production_year,
    r.role AS role
FROM 
    filtered_titles ft
    JOIN cast_info c ON c.movie_id = ft.movie_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON a.person_id = c.person_id
    JOIN role_type r ON r.id = c.role_id;

FROM aka_name a
JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id

WHERE t.production_year = 2020;

sql2:

sql1:
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    t.production_year,
    cc.kind AS company_type,
    COUNT(*) AS num_actors
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
JOIN
    aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN
    company_type cc ON mc.company_type_id = cc.id
GROUP BY
    a.name, t.title, t.production_year, cc.kind
ORDER BY
    num_actors DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH movie_company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, cc.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type cc ON mc.company_type_id = cc.id
),
actor_movies AS (
    SELECT a.name AS actor_name, ci.movie_id, t.id AS aka_title_id, t.title, t.production_year
    FROM aka_name a
    JOIN cast_info ci ON a.person_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN aka_title t ON ci.movie_id = t.movie_id
)
SELECT
    am.actor_name AS actor_name,
    am.title AS movie_title,
    am.production_year,
    mci.company_type,
    COUNT(*) AS num_actors
FROM
    actor_movies am
JOIN
    movie_company_info mci ON am.aka_title_id = mci.movie_id
GROUP BY
    am.actor_name, am.title, am.production_year, mci.company_type
ORDER BY
    num_actors DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name, 
    t.title AS movie_title, 
    c.note AS cast_note, 
    n.name AS person_name
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    name n ON c.person_id = n.imdb_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH recent_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
cast_with_names AS (
    SELECT c.person_id, c.movie_id, c.note, n.name AS person_name
    FROM cast_info c
    JOIN name n ON c.person_id = n.imdb_id
)
SELECT
    a.name AS aka_name,
    rt.title AS movie_title,
    cn.note AS cast_note,
    cn.person_name AS person_name
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    cast_with_names cn ON a.person_id = cn.person_id
JOIN
    recent_titles rt ON cn.movie_id = rt.id
ORDER BY
    rt.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT

FROM 
    aka_name a 
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id 
JOIN

    t.kind_id = 1;
sql2:

    aka_title t
JOIN
    cast_info c ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
JOIN

WHERE

SELECT

    ci.note

    title t
JOIN

JOIN
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
JOIN

sql2:
WITH movies_2021 AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year = 2021
),
movie_with_companies AS (
    SELECT m.id, m.title
    FROM movies_2021 m
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM movie_companies mc
        JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
        WHERE mc.movie_id = m.id
    )
)
SELECT
    mwc.title,
    a.name,
    ci.note
FROM
    cast_info ci
JOIN
    movie_with_companies mwc ON ci.movie_id = mwc.id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
ORDER BY
    mwc.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    t.title, 
    a.name AS actor_name, 
    r.role
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.title;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year > 2000
),
title_cast AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, cc.subject_id
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM movie_companies mc
        JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
        WHERE mc.movie_id = ft.id
    )
)
SELECT 
    tc.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    r.role
FROM 
    title_cast tc
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON tc.subject_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
ORDER BY 
    tc.title;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS role_order,
    r.role AS role_name
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    c.nr_order;
sql2:
SELECT
    a.name AS actor_name,
    m.title AS movie_title,
    m.nr_order AS role_order,
    m.role AS role_name
FROM
    aka_name a
JOIN
    (SELECT c.person_id, c.nr_order, t.title, t.production_year, r.role
     FROM cast_info c
     JOIN title t ON c.movie_id = t.id AND t.production_year >= 2000
     JOIN role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id) m
    ON a.person_id = m.person_id
ORDER BY
    m.production_year DESC,
    m.nr_order;

JOIN

JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN

WHERE 
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY

sql2:
WITH movie_actors AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
movie_companies_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    t.title,
    ma.actor_name,
    mci.company_type
FROM
    title t
JOIN
    movie_actors ma ON t.id = ma.movie_id
JOIN
    movie_companies_info mci ON t.id = mci.movie_id
WHERE
    t.production_year > 2000
ORDER BY
    t.title;

sql1:
SELECT

    c.kind AS company_type,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON cc.subject_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
title_cast AS (
    SELECT ft.id, ft.title, ft.production_year, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON cc.subject_id = a.person_id
),
title_company AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
)
SELECT 
    tc.title,
    tc.actor_name,
    tco.company_type,
    m.info AS movie_info
FROM 
    title_cast tc
JOIN 
    title_company tco ON tc.id = tco.movie_id
JOIN 
    movie_info m ON tc.id = m.movie_id
ORDER BY 
    tc.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.note AS cast_note
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id
JOIN 
    aka_title t ON c.movie_id = t.movie_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC;
sql2:
WITH movie_cast AS (
    SELECT c.person_id, c.movie_id, c.note
    FROM cast_info c
    WHERE c.movie_id IN (
        SELECT at.movie_id
        FROM aka_title at
        WHERE at.production_year >= 2000
    )
)
SELECT 
    a.name AS aka_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    mc.note AS cast_note
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    movie_cast mc ON a.person_id = mc.person_id
JOIN

WHERE
    c.movie_id IN (

    a.name AS actor_name,
    p.info AS actor_info
FROM 
    title t
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    t.production_year = 2020
ORDER BY

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year = 2020
),
title_with_cast AS (
    SELECT ft.id, ft.title, cc.subject_id
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM movie_companies mc
        JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
        WHERE mc.movie_id = ft.id
    )
)
SELECT 
    twc.title,
    a.name AS actor_name,
    p.info AS actor_info
FROM 
    title_with_cast twc
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON twc.subject_id = ci.id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    person_info p ON a.person_id = p.person_id
ORDER BY 
    twc.title;

sql2:
WITH movie_cast AS (

    FROM cast_info c

    )
)
SELECT

FROM

JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id

JOIN 
    movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id 
JOIN

JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id 
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON cc.subject_id = a.person_id 
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON cc.movie_id = c.movie_id AND cc.subject_id = c.person_id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year = 2023 
ORDER BY 
    t.title;
sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT t.id, t.title
    FROM title t
    WHERE t.production_year = 2023
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM movie_keyword mk
          JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
          WHERE mk.movie_id = t.id
      )
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM movie_companies mc
          JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
          WHERE mc.movie_id = t.id
      )
)
SELECT
    ft.title,
    a.name,
    c.nr_order
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    complete_cast cc ON ft.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN
    aka_name a ON cc.subject_id = a.person_id
JOIN
    cast_info c ON cc.movie_id = c.movie_id AND cc.subject_id = c.person_id
ORDER BY
    ft.title;

WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year = 2020
),
title_keywords AS (
    SELECT ft.id AS movie_id, ft.title, k.keyword
    FROM filtered_titles ft
    JOIN movie_keyword mk ON ft.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
),
title_companies AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
    WHERE mc.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM filtered_titles)
),
title_actors AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, a.name AS actor_name
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN aka_name a ON cc.subject_id = a.person_id
    WHERE cc.movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM filtered_titles)
)
SELECT
    tk.title,
    ta.actor_name,
    tc.company_type,
    tk.keyword
FROM
    title_keywords tk
JOIN
    title_companies tc ON tk.movie_id = tc.movie_id
JOIN
    title_actors ta ON tk.movie_id = ta.movie_id;

JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN 
    aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
JOIN 
    company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
WHERE 
    t.production_year = 2020
ORDER BY 
    t.title, a.name;
sql2:
WITH movies_2020 AS (
    SELECT id, title
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year = 2020
),
movie_actors AS (
    SELECT m.id AS movie_id, m.title, a.name AS actor_name, ci.note AS role_notes
    FROM movies_2020 m
    JOIN cast_info ci ON m.id = ci.movie_id
    JOIN aka_name a ON ci.person_id = a.person_id
),
movie_companies_info AS (
    SELECT m.id AS movie_id, c.name AS company_name
    FROM movies_2020 m
    JOIN movie_companies mc ON m.id = mc.movie_id
    JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    ma.title,
    ma.actor_name,
    ma.role_notes,
    mci.company_name
FROM
    movie_actors ma
JOIN
    movie_companies_info mci ON ma.movie_id = mci.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ma.title, ma.actor_name;

SELECT 
    t.title, 
    an.name AS actor_name, 
    c.kind AS company_type 
FROM 
    title t 
JOIN 
    complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id 
JOIN 
    aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id 
JOIN 
    movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN 
    company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id 
WHERE 
    t.production_year >= 2000

sql2:
WITH filtered_titles AS (
    SELECT id, title, production_year
    FROM title
    WHERE production_year >= 2000
),
cast_actors AS (
    SELECT cc.movie_id, an.name AS actor_name
    FROM complete_cast cc
    JOIN cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    JOIN aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
),
company_info AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id, c.kind AS company_type
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_type c ON mc.company_type_id = c.id
)
SELECT
    ft.title,
    ca.actor_name,
    co.company_type
FROM
    filtered_titles ft
JOIN
    cast_actors ca ON ft.id = ca.movie_id
JOIN
    company_info co ON ft.id = co.movie_id
ORDER BY
    ft.production_year DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    a.name AS actor_name,
    t.title AS movie_title,
    c.nr_order AS role_order,
    r.role AS role_type
FROM 
    aka_name a
JOIN 
    cast_info c ON a.person_id = c.person_id

    title t ON c.movie_id = t.id
JOIN 
    role_type r ON c.role_id = r.id
WHERE

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS title_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(ci.id) DESC) AS rank_by_cast
    FROM 
        title t
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
    GROUP BY 
        t.id, t.title, t.production_year
),
PopularActors AS (
    SELECT 
        ak.person_id,
        ak.name,
        COUNT(*) AS movie_count
    FROM 
        aka_name ak
    JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON ak.person_id = ci.person_id
    JOIN 
        title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
    WHERE 
        ak.name IS NOT NULL AND ak.person_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        ak.person_id, ak.name
    HAVING 
        COUNT(*) > 10
),
FilteredMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        r.title_id,
        r.title,
        r.production_year,
        pm.name AS popular_actor
    FROM 
        RankedMovies r
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON r.title_id = ci.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        PopularActors pm ON ci.person_id = pm.person_id
    WHERE 
        r.rank_by_cast = 1
),
NullTitleCheck AS (
    SELECT 
        f.title,
        COALESCE(f.popular_actor, 'No Popular Actor') AS popular_actor,
        COUNT(m.id) AS companies_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN m.note IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_notes
    FROM 
        FilteredMovies f
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_companies m ON f.title_id = m.movie_id
    GROUP BY 
        f.title, f.popular_actor
)

SELECT 
    nt.title,
    nt.popular_actor,
    nt.companies_count,
    nt.null_notes,
    CASE 
        WHEN nt.null_notes > 0 THEN 'Has Nulls'
        ELSE 'No Null Values'
    END AS null_status
FROM 
    NullTitleCheck nt
WHERE 
    nt.companies_count > (SELECT COUNT(*)/2 FROM movie_companies) 
ORDER BY 
    nt.companies_count DESC, nt.title;
sql2:
SELECT 
    nt.title,
    nt.popular_actor,
    nt.companies_count,
    nt.null_notes,
    CASE 
        WHEN nt.null_notes > 0 THEN 'Has Nulls'
        ELSE 'No Null Values'
    END AS null_status
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            f.title,
            COALESCE(f.popular_actor, 'No Popular Actor') AS popular_actor,
            COUNT(m.id) AS companies_count,
            SUM(CASE WHEN m.note IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_notes
        FROM 
            (
                SELECT 
                    r.title_id,
                    r.title,
                    r.production_year,
                    pm.name AS popular_actor
                FROM 
                    (
                        SELECT 
                            t.id AS title_id,
                            t.title,
                            t.production_year,
                            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY COUNT(ci.id) DESC) AS rank_by_cast
                        FROM 
                            title t
                        LEFT JOIN 
                            complete_cast cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id
                        LEFT JOIN 
                            cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
                        GROUP BY 
                            t.id, t.title, t.production_year
                    ) r
                LEFT JOIN 
                    cast_info ci ON r.title_id = ci.movie_id
                LEFT JOIN 
                    (
                        SELECT 
                            ak.person_id,
                            ak.name
                        FROM 
                            aka_name ak
                        JOIN 
                            cast_info ci ON ak.person_id = ci.person_id
                        JOIN 
                            title t ON ci.movie_id = t.id
                        WHERE 
                            ak.name IS NOT NULL AND ak.person_id IS NOT NULL
                        GROUP BY 
                            ak.person_id, ak.name
                        HAVING 
                            COUNT(*) > 10
                    ) pm ON ci.person_id = pm.person_id
                WHERE 
                    r.rank_by_cast = 1
            ) f
        LEFT JOIN 
            movie_companies m ON f.title_id = m.movie_id
        GROUP BY 
            f.title, f.popular_actor
    ) nt
CROSS JOIN 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) / 2 AS threshold FROM movie_companies) mc_threshold
WHERE 
    nt.companies_count > mc_threshold.threshold
ORDER BY 
    nt.companies_count DESC, nt.title;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        a.title,
        a.production_year,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year) AS movie_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year ORDER BY a.production_year DESC, a.title) AS rn
    FROM 
        aka_title AS a
    JOIN 
        movie_keyword AS mk ON a.id = mk.movie_id
    JOIN 
        keyword AS k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        k.keyword LIKE '%Adventure%'
),
TopMovies AS (
    SELECT
        title,
        production_year,
        movie_count
    FROM
        RankedMovies
    WHERE
        rn <= 5
),
DistinctCast AS (
    SELECT 
        DISTINCT ci.person_id,
        ci.movie_id,
        ct.kind AS role_type
    FROM
        cast_info AS ci
    JOIN 
        comp_cast_type AS ct ON ci.person_role_id = ct.id
    WHERE 
        ct.kind IS NOT NULL
),
PersonInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        n.id AS person_id,
        n.name,
        pi.info AS biography
    FROM 
        name AS n
    LEFT JOIN 
        person_info AS pi ON n.imdb_id = pi.person_id
    WHERE 
        pi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'Biography') 
        OR pi.info_type_id IS NULL
)
SELECT 
    t.title,
    t.production_year,
    c.person_id,
    p.name,
    p.biography,
    ct.kind AS cast_type
FROM 
    TopMovies AS t
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
    movie_companies AS mc ON t.title = (SELECT title FROM aka_title WHERE id = mc.movie_id LIMIT 1)
LEFT JOIN 
    DistinctCast AS c ON t.title = (SELECT a.title FROM aka_title a WHERE a.id = c.movie_id LIMIT 1)
LEFT JOIN 
    PersonInfo AS p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    comp_cast_type AS ct ON c.role_type = ct.kind
WHERE 
    (mc.company_type_id IS NULL OR mc.company_type_id IN (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'Distributor'))
    AND (t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023 OR t.production_year IS NULL)
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    t.title ASC,
    p.name ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    t.title,
    t.production_year,
    c.person_id,
    p.name,
    p.biography,
    ct.kind AS cast_type
FROM 
    (
        SELECT rm.title, rm.production_year, rm.movie_count
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                a.title,
                a.production_year,
                COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year) AS movie_count,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.production_year ORDER BY a.production_year DESC, a.title) AS rn
            FROM 
                aka_title AS a
            JOIN 
                movie_keyword AS mk ON a.id = mk.movie_id
            JOIN 
                keyword AS k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
            WHERE 
                k.keyword LIKE '%Adventure%'
        ) rm
        WHERE rm.rn <= 5
    ) AS t
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
    movie_companies AS mc ON t.title = (SELECT title FROM aka_title WHERE id = mc.movie_id LIMIT 1)
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            ci.person_id,
            ci.movie_id,
            cct.kind AS role_type
        FROM
            cast_info AS ci
        JOIN 
            comp_cast_type AS cct ON ci.person_role_id = cct.id
        WHERE 
            cct.kind IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY
            ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, cct.kind
    ) AS c ON t.title = (SELECT a.title FROM aka_title a WHERE a.id = c.movie_id LIMIT 1)
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            n.id AS person_id,
            n.name,
            pi.info AS biography
        FROM 
            name AS n
        LEFT JOIN 
            person_info AS pi ON n.imdb_id = pi.person_id
        LEFT JOIN 
            info_type AS it ON pi.info_type_id = it.id AND it.info = 'Biography'
        WHERE 
            it.id IS NOT NULL
            OR pi.info_type_id IS NULL
    ) AS p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    comp_cast_type AS ct ON c.role_type = ct.kind
WHERE 
    (mc.company_type_id IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'Distributor' AND id = mc.company_type_id))
    AND (t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2023 OR t.production_year IS NULL)
ORDER BY 
    t.production_year DESC, 
    t.title ASC,
    p.name ASC;

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.title) AS title_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
        JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE 
        t.production_year IS NOT NULL
        AND mc.company_type_id IN (
            SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'Production'
        )
),
CastRoles AS (
    SELECT 
        ci.movie_id,
        ci.person_id,
        r.role,
        COUNT(ci.id) AS role_count
    FROM 
        cast_info ci
        JOIN role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
    GROUP BY 
        ci.movie_id, ci.person_id, r.role
),
DistinctTitles AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        t.title 
    FROM 
        aka_title t 
),
CoalescedInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        pi.person_id,
        COALESCE(pi.info, 'No Info Available') AS person_info
    FROM 
        person_info pi
)
SELECT 
    mv.title AS movie_title,
    mv.production_year,
    ca.role,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) AS actor_count,
    MIN(COALESCE(ci.person_info, 'Information Missing')) AS actor_info,
    mv.title_rank
FROM 
    RankedMovies mv
LEFT JOIN 
    CastRoles ca ON mv.movie_id = ca.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    CoalescedInfo ci ON ca.person_id = ci.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
    DistinctTitles dt ON mv.title = dt.title
GROUP BY 
    mv.movie_id, mv.title, mv.production_year, ca.role, mv.title_rank
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT ca.person_id) > 0 
    AND mv.production_year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1990
ORDER BY 
    mv.production_year DESC, actor_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    mv.title AS movie_title,
    mv.production_year,
    r.role,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS actor_count,
    MIN(CASE WHEN pi.id IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(pi.info, 'No Info Available') ELSE 'Information Missing' END) AS actor_info,
    mv.title_rank
FROM (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.title) AS title_rank
    FROM 
        aka_title t
        JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.movie_id = mc.movie_id
        JOIN company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id AND ct.kind = 'Production'
    WHERE 
        t.production_year BETWEEN 1980 AND 1990
) mv
JOIN cast_info ci ON mv.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN role_type r ON ci.role_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN person_info pi ON ci.person_id = pi.person_id
GROUP BY 
    mv.movie_id, mv.title, mv.production_year, r.role, mv.title_rank
ORDER BY 
    mv.production_year DESC, actor_count DESC;

sql1:
WITH RecursiveCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        ca.person_id,
        ca.movie_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ca.person_id ORDER BY ca.nr_order) AS actor_rank,
        COALESCE(d.name_pcode_nf, 'UNKNOWN') AS actor_pcode
    FROM 
        cast_info ca
    LEFT JOIN 
        aka_name d ON ca.person_id = d.person_id
),
MovieStats AS (
    SELECT 
        m.id AS movie_id,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
    FROM 
        aka_title m
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info c ON m.id = c.movie_id
    WHERE 
        m.production_year IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        m.id
),
ActorTitles AS (
    SELECT 
        am.movie_id,
        a.name AS actor_name,
        r.role AS actor_role,
        COALESCE(mt.title, 'Untitled') AS movie_title,
        mt.production_year
    FROM 
        RecursiveCTE am
    INNER JOIN 
        aka_name a ON am.person_id = a.person_id
    INNER JOIN 
        role_type r ON am.movie_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        aka_title mt ON am.movie_id = mt.id
    WHERE 
        a.name IS NOT NULL
),
FilteredMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        movie_id,
        actor_name,
        actor_role,
        movie_title,
        production_year
    FROM 
        ActorTitles
    WHERE 
        actor_role IN (SELECT role FROM role_type WHERE role LIKE '%lead%')
)
SELECT 
    f.movie_id,
    f.actor_name,
    f.actor_role,
    f.movie_title,
    f.production_year,
    CASE 
        WHEN f.production_year < 2000 THEN 'Classic'
        WHEN f.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010 THEN 'Modern'
        ELSE 'Recent' 
    END AS era,
    m.keyword_count,
    m.cast_count
FROM 
    FilteredMovies f
JOIN 
    MovieStats m ON f.movie_id = m.movie_id
LEFT JOIN 
    company_name cn ON m.movie_id = cn.imdb_id
WHERE 
    (cn.country_code IS NULL OR cn.country_code <> 'USA')
ORDER BY 
    m.cast_count DESC,
    f.production_year ASC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
SELECT
    f.movie_id,
    f.actor_name,
    f.actor_role,
    f.movie_title,
    f.production_year,
    CASE
        WHEN f.production_year < 2000 THEN 'Classic'
        WHEN f.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010 THEN 'Modern'
        ELSE 'Recent'
    END AS era,
    m.keyword_count,
    m.cast_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        sub.movie_id,
        sub.actor_name,
        sub.actor_role,
        sub.movie_title,
        sub.production_year
    FROM (
        SELECT
            ca.movie_id,
            a.name AS actor_name,
            r.role AS actor_role,
            COALESCE(mt.title, 'Untitled') AS movie_title,
            mt.production_year
        FROM
            cast_info ca
        LEFT JOIN
            aka_name d ON ca.person_id = d.person_id
        INNER JOIN
            aka_name a ON ca.person_id = a.person_id
        INNER JOIN
            role_type r ON ca.movie_id = r.id
        LEFT JOIN
            aka_title mt ON ca.movie_id = mt.id
        WHERE
            a.name IS NOT NULL
    ) sub
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM role_type rt
            WHERE rt.role LIKE '%lead%' AND rt.role = sub.actor_role
        )
) f
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
        m.id AS movie_id,
        COUNT(mk.keyword_id) AS keyword_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.person_id) AS cast_count
    FROM
        aka_title m
    LEFT JOIN
        movie_keyword mk ON m.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN
        cast_info c ON m.id = c.movie_id
    WHERE
        m.production_year IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
        m.id
) m ON f.movie_id = m.movie_id
LEFT JOIN
    company_name cn ON m.movie_id = cn.imdb_id
WHERE
    cn.country_code IS NULL OR cn.country_code <> 'USA'
ORDER BY
    m.cast_count DESC,
    f.production_year ASC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
WITH RankedMovies AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year ORDER BY t.title) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year) AS total_movies
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    WHERE 
        t.kind_id IN (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
        AND (t.production_year IS NOT NULL OR t.production_year > 2000) 
),
MoviesWithCast AS (
    SELECT 
        rm.movie_id,
        rm.title,
        rm.production_year,
        COUNT(ci.person_id) AS cast_count,
        COALESCE(MAX(k.keyword), 'No Keyword') AS keyword_summary
    FROM 
        RankedMovies rm
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON rm.movie_id = ci.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON rm.movie_id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    GROUP BY 
        rm.movie_id, rm.title, rm.production_year
),
KeywordCount AS (
    SELECT 
        m.movie_id,
        m.title,
        m.production_year,
        m.cast_count,
        m.keyword_summary,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY m.cast_count DESC) AS rank_by_cast
    FROM 
        MoviesWithCast m
), 
MovieDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        m.movie_id,
        m.title,
        m.production_year,
        m.cast_count,
        m.keyword_summary,
        COALESCE(ct.kind, 'Unknown Genre') AS genre,
        ci.note AS cast_note
    FROM 
        KeywordCount m
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_companies mc ON m.movie_id = mc.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        company_type ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
    LEFT JOIN 
        complete_cast cc ON cc.movie_id = m.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON cc.subject_id = ci.id
)
SELECT 
    md.movie_id,
    md.title,
    md.production_year,
    md.cast_count,
    md.keyword_summary,
    md.genre,
    md.cast_note,
    CASE 
        WHEN md.cast_count IS NULL THEN 'No Cast Available'
        WHEN md.cast_count > 5 THEN 'Large Cast'
        WHEN md.cast_count BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN 'Small Cast'
        ELSE 'No Cast Information'
    END AS cast_size_description,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_info mi WHERE mi.movie_id = md.movie_id AND mi.info ILIKE '%award%') THEN 'Award Winning'
        ELSE 'Not Awarded'
    END AS movie_status,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie_link ml WHERE ml.movie_id = md.movie_id) AS related_links
FROM 
    MovieDetails md
WHERE 
    md.cast_count > 0
    AND md.production_year BETWEEN 2005 AND 2023
ORDER BY 
    md.production_year DESC, 
    md.cast_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    base.movie_id,
    base.title,
    base.production_year,
    base.cast_count,
    base.keyword_summary,
    COALESCE(ct.kind, 'Unknown Genre') AS genre,
    ci2.note AS cast_note,
    CASE 
        WHEN base.cast_count IS NULL THEN 'No Cast Available'
        WHEN base.cast_count > 5 THEN 'Large Cast'
        WHEN base.cast_count BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN 'Small Cast'
        ELSE 'No Cast Information'
    END AS cast_size_description,
    CASE 
        WHEN award_info.movie_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Award Winning'
        ELSE 'Not Awarded'
    END AS movie_status,
    COALESCE(link_counts.related_links, 0) AS related_links
FROM (
    SELECT 
        t.id AS movie_id,
        t.title,
        t.production_year,
        COUNT(ci.person_id) AS cast_count,
        COALESCE(MAX(k.keyword), 'No Keyword') AS keyword_summary
    FROM 
        aka_title t
    INNER JOIN 
        kind_type kt ON t.kind_id = kt.id AND kt.kind = 'movie'
    LEFT JOIN 
        cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        movie_keyword mk ON t.id = mk.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        keyword k ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
    WHERE 
        (t.production_year IS NOT NULL OR t.production_year > 2000)
    GROUP BY
